civics.name: Corvée System
civics.description: This society considers it the absolute right of the state to decide where its citizens live and work.
civics.tooltip: - Waives all Unity costs for Pop Resettlement.

civics.name: Imperial Cult
civics.description: This society has a dominant state religion where the ruler is worshiped as a living deity.
civics.tooltip: - Ruler's Home Planet has additional [GetPriestIcon] [GetPriest] Jobs

civics.name: Beacon of Liberty
civics.description: This society is a shining beacon of light in a sea of darkness. Liberty and individual freedoms are held in the highest regard here.

civics.name: Exalted Priesthood
civics.description: To guard against heresy, this society is ruled by a religious council consisting of the wisest and most pious members of the clergy.
civics.tooltip: Capital Buildings replace Politician Jobs with High Priests

civics.name: Philosopher King
civics.description: It is not enough to simply rule. The Ship of State must be guided by a king that wields enough wisdom and knowledge to steer it true.

civics.name: Meritocracy
civics.description: An individual's social station or personal connections should have no bearing on their profession. The sole basis for advancement in this society is demonstrated ability and talent.

civics.name: Citizen Service
civics.description: Are you doing your part? Full citizenship and the political responsibility that comes with it is limited to those who have served a tour of duty in the military. Service guarantees citizenship.
civics.tooltip: Grants access to the Recruitment Office Holding

civics.name: Technocracy
civics.description: To maximize efficiency, this society is governed according to the principles of science and rationality. The personal whims of an ignorant and dangerously unqualified political elite must not be allowed to interfere.
civics.tooltip: - Capital Buildings replace Politician Jobs with Science Directors - Scientists start with random Expertise trait - Expertise traits have additional effects - Starts with an additional Scientist

civics.name: Feudal Society
civics.description: This society is organized in a feudal manner, with a monarch whose rule relies on powerful vassals that govern their territories with considerable autonomy.
civics.tooltip: - Ignore Diplomatic Requirements when proposing Subjugation - Your Subjects cannot have the following Agreement Terms:  Expansion Prohibited  Do not join subject wars  Limited Diplomacy

civics.name: Police State
civics.description: To quash any traces of dissent, the population in this repressive society is carefully monitored and controlled by a large internal police force.

civics.name: Idealistic Foundation
civics.description: This society was founded on strong idealistic values. Whether the current government remains true to them or not, the people have not forgotten.

civics.name: Environmentalist
civics.description: This society seeks to co-exist in harmony with nature. Great care is taken to preserve the environment and limit consumerism where possible.
civics.tooltip: - Available Buildings:   - Additional Starting Buildings: Ranger Lodge  - Available Holdings:

civics.name: Slaver Guilds
civics.description: Much of the true political power in this society rests with a number of powerful and ruthless slaver guilds. They know how to get the most out of a slave.

civics.name: Inward Perfection
civics.description: This calm and pacifist society has little use for strangers who do not understand its way of life. More than anything, these people would prefer to be left alone.
civics.tooltip: Cannot have Rivals Cannot form Defensive Pacts Cannot form Migration Treaties Cannot form Research Agreements Cannot form Commercial Pacts Cannot Guarantee Independence Cannot join Federations Cannot Infiltrate pre-FTLs Cannot have forced Subjects Cannot use Unrestricted Wars policy
civics.negative_tooltip: Blocks the Minister of State Council Position
civics.effects: country_unity_produces_mult: +20.0%; founder_species_growth_mult: +10.0%; country_edict_fund_add: +50; pop_citizen_happiness: +0.05; envoys_add: -1; intel_encryption_add: +1; intel_decryption_add: -1

civics.name: Warrior Culture
civics.description: This society has developed into a hardy warrior culture. Martial prowess is valued above all else, and true glory can only be found on the field of battle.
civics.tooltip: - Replaces Entertainer Jobs with Duelist Jobs. - Duelists turn Alloys into Unity, Amenities, and Naval Capacity. - Replaces Conserved Fauna Jobs with Gladiatorial Beast Jobs.

civics.name: Distinguished Admiralty
civics.description: The Fleet and the Admiralty have unusually prominent roles in this society, wielding a great deal of influence in political circles. They have the pick of the litter when it comes to new military recruits.

civics.name: Free Haven
civics.description: This society has a well-earned reputation as a free haven. The tired, the poor, the huddled masses yearning to breathe free - all are welcome here, regardless of their species or origin.

civics.name: Cutthroat Politics
civics.description: The political system in this society is renowned for its intrigue. Power struggles, shady backroom deals and cloak and dagger scheming are par for the course. Those who survive long enough to learn the game, however, tend to learn it well.

civics.name: Corporate Dominion
civics.description: This society is dominated by a megacorporation that has completely supplanted the role of the state.
civics.tooltip: Starts with the Offworld Trade Companies technology already unlocked Unlocks Ship Type: Private Colony Ship

civics.name: Agrarian Idyll
civics.description: A simple and peaceful life can often be the most rewarding. This agrarian society has, to a large extent, managed to avoid large-scale urbanization.
civics.tooltip: Agriculture Districts provide 400 more Housing. Generator Districts and Mining Districts provide 300 more Housing. City Districts provide 200 less Housing.  Farmers also produce 2 Amenities.

civics.name: Shadow Council
civics.description: Unbeknownst to its own citizens, this society is actually manipulated from behind the scenes by a secretive shadow council. Appearances must be kept, but the tyranny of the majority should also be guarded against. After all, what if the fools vote for the wrong candidate?

civics.name: Mining Guilds
civics.description: Several large mining guilds have reached a dominant position in this society. The government relies heavily on their support.

civics.name: Parliamentary System
civics.description: The parliamentary system in this society encourages a free and lively debate. Currying favor with one of the dominant political factions can prove to be quite advantageous.
civics.tooltip: Factions will form in your empire shortly after the game starts.

civics.name: Efficient Bureaucracy
civics.description: This society is renowned for its efficiency. Not only do the mag-trains run on time, but the colossal bureaucratic apparatus required to run an interstellar nation has been greatly streamlined.
civics.tooltip: Bureaucrats and [GetPriestIcon] [GetPriestPlural] provide Edict Fund scaling with their Unity production.

civics.name: Nationalistic Zeal
civics.description: A strong sense of nationalistic pride permeates all layers of this society.

civics.name: Functional Architecture
civics.description: This society is renowned for its simple yet functional architecture. There are those who would refer to this building style as boring or even depressing, but in most cases, neo-concrete does the job just as well as any other building material.
civics.tooltip: - Waives Technology requirements for Basic

civics.name: Aristocratic Elite
civics.description: This society has an entrenched nobility that occupies the upper echelons of society.
civics.tooltip: - Capital Buildings replace Politician Jobs with Nobles - Can construct Noble Estates buildings that add additional Noble Jobs - Grants access to the Noble Chateaus Holding - Leaders have a 20% chance to start with an additional positive and negative trait.

civics.name: Shared Burdens
civics.description: This society believes in an equitable distribution of resources, making little to no distinction between the needs of ruler and ruled. All work together for the benefit of the whole.
civics.tooltip: Allows Shared Burdens Living Standard, under which all Pops have moderate Consumer Goods Upkeep regardless of Strata Disables the use of most other Living Standards Grants access to the Communal Housing Outreach Holding

civics.name: Fanatic Purifiers
civics.description: This society appears hellbent on scouring the galaxy of all other sapient life. Come what may, they will suffer no xenos to live.
civics.tooltip: Cannot engage in Diplomacy with other species! Cannot access the Galactic Market Has the 'Purification' casus belli on other species Xeno Pops will always be purged Gains Unity from purging Xeno Pops May use Armageddon bombardment stance
civics.negative_tooltip: Blocks the Minister of State Council Position

civics.name: Barbaric Despoilers
civics.description: This society holds few things sacred. To fight is to live, and the strongest may seize whatever they covet.
civics.tooltip: Cannot form Migration Treaties Cannot form (but can join) Federations other than Martial Alliances or Hegemonies Has the 'Despoliation' casus belli on all other empires Unlocks the Raiding bombardment stance, which in turn allows us to abduct pops from besieged planets and resettle them to our own worlds. Decreased Opinion for most other empires

civics.name: Byzantine Bureaucracy
civics.description: This society is largely governed by a complex and, to the outsider, almost labyrinthine system of bureaucracy. An army of officials and functionaries work tirelessly to keep the government running smoothly and ensure no citizens are allocated resources they cannot demonstrate a properly filed and triple-stamped need for.

civics.name: Merchant Guilds
civics.description: A number of powerful and very influential merchant guilds have risen to prominent positions in this society. They hold significant sway with the government.
civics.tooltip: Capital Buildings provide Merchant Jobs

civics.name: Reanimators
civics.description: Within this society, death is no bar to the call to arms. Masters of the art of necromancy reanimate corpses to raise dread hosts and guardians, striking fear into the hearts of lesser mortals.
civics.tooltip: - Soldiers are replaced with Necromancers - Available Buildings:  - Available Holdings:  - Defeated Organic Armies are sometimes resurrected as Undead Armies - Defeated organic Leviathans can sometimes be resurrected - Controlled cloned organic Space Fauna can be reanimated

civics.name: Diplomatic Corps
civics.description: This society has a long tradition of rhetoric and debate, and celebrate those who are able to get their way using only words.

civics.name: Death Cult
civics.description: This society's religion is built around periodic, ritual sacrifice. Willing initiates devote themselves to a decade of study before meeting an end whose effects ripple throughout their culture.
civics.tooltip: - Available Buildings:   - Additional Starting Buildings: Sacrificial Temple   - Available Holdings:   - Access to   - Priests are converted into Death Priests

civics.name: Memorialists
civics.description: This empire pays tribute to memories and sapients of the past, deriving greater stability and insight from the continuous cycles of death, rebirth and legacy.
civics.tooltip: - Can build Sanctuary of Repose - Sanctuaries of Repose improve Governing Ethics Attraction on Tomb Worlds and Relic Worlds - Death Chroniclers turn Consumer Goods into Unity and Stability, and inherit the Ethics-based modifiers of [civilian.GetIcon] [civilian.GetNamePlural]

civics.name: Catalytic Processing
civics.description: By focusing their industrial efforts on catalytic chemistry, this civilization has unlocked the key to using organic materials in the construction of spacebound structures.
civics.tooltip: - [foundry.GetIcon] [foundry.GetNamePlural] are replaced with Catalytic Technicians  - [foundry.GetIcon] [artisan.GetIcon] Industrial Jobs have their Minerals Upkeep replaced with Food Upkeep.

civics.name: Masterful Crafters
civics.description: A penchant for meticulous crafting lies at the heart of this society. Deft appendages and keen sensory organs aid them in creating truly wondrous treasures even in the most basic of trades.
civics.tooltip: Artisans are replaced with Artificers  Artificers turn Minerals into Consumer Goods and Trade

civics.name: Pleasure Seekers
civics.description: This society rejoices in its own perfection. Those who are elevated by their privileged social structure have surrendered to a culture which glorifies pleasure and entertainment, regardless of a cost typically borne by others.
civics.tooltip: - [civilian.GetIcon] [civilian.GetNamePlural] are converted into Hedonists, which do not produce Amenities   - Allows Decadent Lifestyle Living Standard, under which all Pops have increased Happiness, Consumer Goods Upkeep and Amenities Usage   - Hedonists with Decadent Lifestyle provide Unity and Pop Growth (or Assembly) Speed, but require Amenities   - Additional Starting Buildings:

civics.name: Idyllic Bloom
civics.description: This society has long dedicated itself to environmental care and improvement, striving to create a true paradise for its inhabitants.
civics.tooltip: Can build Gaia Seeders on your and your vassal's worlds ideal to your starting species. Facilities spread across the planet progressively bring it closer to becoming a Gaia World, through 4 upgrade phases. As you unlock improved Terraforming technologies, Gaia Seeders can be constructed on additional planet types.

civics.name: Anglers
civics.description: This society is well-adapted to an aquatic environment, using the bounty of the sea to fuel its economy.
civics.tooltip: - On Ocean Worlds, Agriculture Districts are uncapped.  - On Wet worlds, Agriculture Districts have the Aquaculture Specialization.
civics.negative_tooltip: - Requires the trait.

civics.name: Marine Machines
civics.description: This mechanical society is engineered for seamless operation in diverse aquatic environments and excels in crafting unparalleled marine infrastructure to drive its economy.
civics.tooltip: - On Ocean Worlds, Agriculture Districts are uncapped.  - On Wet worlds, Agriculture Districts have the Aquaculture Specialization.
civics.negative_tooltip: - Requires the trait.

civics.name: Pompous Purists
civics.description: A society so utterly convinced of their own superiority, that any attempt at diplomacy not initiated by themselves will be utterly ignored.
civics.tooltip: Can only engage in Diplomacy with other empires if they are the proposer.

civics.name: Mutagenic Spas
civics.description: This civilization engages in ritualistic mutagenic bathing, with professional attendants overseeing the use of highly dangerous substances. This 'invigorating' process may appall uninitiated onlookers.
civics.tooltip: - Can build Mutagenic Spas. - Mutagenic Spa Attendants turn Consumer Goods into Amenities, Pop Growth and Monthly Organic Pop Growth Multiplier but reduce Happiness and Habitability.   Urban District Development (and Industrial Specialization) increase some of these effects.

civics.name: Relentless Industrialists
civics.description: To live is to exploit. This civilization is built around the principle of living life to the fullest, in the sense of squeezing the maximum profit from every last ounce of matter and membrane available for exploitation.
civics.tooltip: Can build Coordinated Fulfillment Center, significantly increasing Alloy and Consumer Goods output at the cost of reduced Pop Growth and gradually turning planets into Tomb Worlds.

civics.name: Scavengers
civics.description: In this society, nothing goes to waste, even in the grimmest times of war: no enemy technology will go undiscovered, as teams of scrappers accompanying the war fleets scrape wreckages of anything and everything worth salvaging.
civics.tooltip: - Researching Debris grants both Research and a portion of other Resource Costs of the destroyed fleet - Ships can be salvaged from some Debris

civics.name: Ascensionists
civics.description: The ultimate goal of this empire is to ascend to ever greater levels of fulfillment.
civics.tooltip: - Colonies have +1 Ascension Tier on game start.

civics.name: Vaults of Knowledge
civics.description: The knowledge, principles, and experiences of exceptional people are digitized and accumulated in the Vaults of Knowledge. Citizens can access this source of wisdom and experience to learn from the ghosts of the past.
civics.tooltip: Can build unique Vaults of Knowledge Vaults of Knowledge produce Unity and increase Leader Experience Gain based on Destiny Traits acquired.

civics.name: Crusader Spirit
civics.description: The lack of guidance creates weak minds - which easily succumb to corruption and plunge into decadence. This society has assumed the self-imposed mantle of bringing "enlightenment" to the masses through aggressive proselytizing.
civics.tooltip: Commanders start with the Crusader Trait Can only use Liberation Wars policy

civics.name: Eager Explorers
civics.description: Yearning for the stars, this civilization sped through several stages of development, reaching the age of galactic exploration far earlier than most.
civics.tooltip: Start with 2 Exploration Vessels and an Engineering Vessel equipped with Subspace Drives, making them incapable of Hyperlane travel but granting limited Jump Drive abilities. Gain an increased chance to discover FTL Travel Technologies
civics.negative_tooltip: - Start at a technological and infrastructural disadvantage, and with 1K fewer Pops than normal

civics.name: Hyperspace Specialty
civics.description: This society has always embraced speed. The manipulation of hyperspace is just another thoroughfare, and those with aptitude in the field have risen to the highest caste.
civics.tooltip: Hyperlane Breach Points is Guaranteed Research Option. Has Low Intel on all systems within 3 Hyperlanes of your starting system.

civics.name: Dimensional Worship
civics.description: This society believes that a divine existence lies beyond the folds in space and time. Systems where instabilities are highest hold a sacred meaning to them as sites of both pilgrimage and research.
civics.tooltip: - Available Starbase Buildings: ['starbase_building:dimensional_shrine', Dimensional Shrine]

civics.name: Heroic Past
civics.description: The legendary heroes of the past inspire each new generation to achieve the extraordinary. As role models, government officials embody these ideals.

civics.name: Oppressive Autocracy
civics.description: Only the elite of the elite deserve the best of the best. Everyone else is expected to provide for the ruling class and their lackeys.
civics.tooltip: Force Dystopian Society Living Standard, under which non-Elite Jobs have decreased Consumer Goods Upkeep Only Elite Jobs and [enforcer.GetIcon] [enforcer.GetNamePlural] have Amenities Upkeep Most Pops generate 1 additional Crime Only Elite Jobs can produce Amenities Forbids Holo-Theatres

civics.name: Selective Kinship
civics.description: In an uncertain universe, only kin can be trusted. This civilization is selective about the species it defines as equals.

civics.name: Dark Consortium
civics.description: A deep understanding of the architecture of the universe allowed this society to exploit the mysterious properties of dark matter long before the discovery of the hyperdrive.
civics.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies:  - ['technology:tech_mine_dark_matter', Dark Matter Drawing]   - Access to   - Has access to the Dark Matter Breakthrough Council Agenda.

civics.name: Natural Design
civics.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths WARNING: Unable to modify organic species  This society is adamant that nature has already created perfection in its people's genetic code. They have long devoted their medical and governmental services to the health and preservation of natural, untouched genome sequences.
civics.tooltip: Available Buildings:
civics.negative_tooltip: - Lowers approval of empires that have started Ascension Paths

civics.name: Sovereign Guardianship
civics.description: This collection of warring tribes has developed a historical preference for entrenched territories and defensive posturing. Now united, they are prepared to bring this philosophy to the stars, aiming to keep their borders solid and tensions low.
civics.tooltip: Unlocks Fanatic Guardians as defense armies. Allows building a Reloading Bay in starbases. Enables Inner Focus Edict, converting Influence into Unity.
civics.effects: empire_size_colonies_mult: +1; empire_size_branch_office_mult: +1; empire_size_systems_mult: +1.5; empire_size_pops_mult: -50.0%; empire_size_districts_mult: -50.0%; diplo_weight_mult: +20.0%

civics.name: Genesis Guides
civics.description: This society is devoted to the creation of emerging species. As the stewards of evolution's potential, they allocate portions of their worlds to safeguard the development of pre-sapient life forms.
civics.tooltip: - Available Colony Ships: Genesis Ark - Planets Colonized with Genesis Arks:  - Pre-Sapient Pops: +300   - Planetary Features: Genesis Preserve  - Gains Unity from uplifting Pre-Sapient Species
civics.negative_tooltip: - Cannot build Colony Ships - Cannot build Alien Zoos

civics.name: Lubrication Tanks
civics.description: This machine empire improved upon its basic drone-shell production through the vigorous application of highly aggressive lubrication agents, controlled by carefully programmed terminals. This 'optimized' process relies on typically wasted byproducts from the industries that are now repurposed for maximal efficiency.
civics.tooltip: - Can build Hyper Lubrication Basins. - Lubrication Terminals turn Alloys into Pop Assembly but increase Amenities Usage.

civics.name: Rapid Replicator
civics.description: This society has taken control of the means of self-assembly. Each machine begets another, forming an unbroken chain stretching our planet's limits.

civics.name: Static Research Analysis
civics.description: This society excels in predictive analysis within research methodologies, ensuring the pursuit of only the most promising leads.

civics.name: Warbots
civics.description: This society constantly refines its armies, economy, and education for diverse warfare strategies. Each machine contributes to collective strength, ensuring adaptability and success in conflict.

civics.name: Astrometeorology
civics.description: With deep respect for the forces of nature, this species goes to great lengths to uncover the inner workings of environmental phenomena. As they set out across the stars, they take with them a particular interest in astrometeorology. Central to their ambitions are the most fantastic and potentially destructive of all astronomical events, the cosmic storms themselves.
civics.tooltip: - Available Buildings:   - Additional Starting Buildings: Astrometeorology Observatory

civics.name: Storm Devotion
civics.description: Ever since ancient times, this society has been able to attract tempests through their rituals. Over the years, they combined technical innovations to enhance their efficiency. With the dawn of the space age, they now seek to take this knowledge to the stars.
civics.tooltip: - Available Buildings:  - Replaces [entertainer.GetIcon] [entertainer.GetName] Jobs with Storm Dancer Jobs - Species Traits:

civics.name: Planetscapers
civics.description: After eons of carefully cultivating a perfect balance on their homeworld, this society is ready to tend to even the most inhospitable environments among the stars. At their core, these people believe nature can be shaped, controlled, and perfected. Not to tame, but in service of perfect beauty.
civics.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies: Technologies to remove on the Homeworld - Technologies to remove Natural Blockers are granted as Permanent Research Options upon Colonization - Mastery of Nature replaced with Cultivated Worldscaping Planetary  - For each Natural Blocker on Colonized :  - Resources from Jobs: -10%  - Pop Growth Speed: -10%  - Pop Upkeep: +15%
civics.negative_tooltip: - Homeworld: Starts with two Natural Blockers

civics.name: Galactic Curators
civics.description: The meticulous collection and preservation of historical artifacts has always fascinated this civilization. But now, with the mysteries of the galaxy at their doorstep, there is everything left to learn.
civics.tooltip: - Guaranteed Research Options: ['technology:tech_galactic_archivism', Galactic Archivism] - Initial ['concept_specimen', Specimens]: One §0Common of each Collection Category  - Gain Unity each time you find a Specimen or complete an Archaeological Site  - Purchases from the Curator Enclave: $@galactic_curators_curator_enclave_purchase_cost|%0$ - Enables the Decentralized Research Edict, increasing Research Station Output but decreasing [GetResearcher] Job Output - Replaces Entertainer Jobs with Museum Curator Jobs

civics.name: Beastmasters
civics.description: Coming to full, technological maturity in a system that serves as a feeding ground for Space Amoebas, this society has acquired a deep knowledge of their life cycle. They now work to nurture, raise, and ultimately clone these creatures for mutual benefit.
civics.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies:  - ['technology:tech_gravity_wells', Gravity Snares]  - ['technology:tech_alien_cloning', Artificial Breeding]  - Available Starbase Buildings: ['concept_beastport', Beastports]  - Home System: Start with a   - Starting Military Ships are replaced with Space Amoebas  - Starting :  - §0Common Space Amoeba

civics.name: Genetic Identification
civics.description: This society requires every citizen to be registered from birth in a genetic index used in every level of bureaucracy.

civics.name: Crowdsourcing
civics.description: This society has realized that individual inspiration is the root of true innovation. Open-source patents, open-mindedness, spontaneous collaborations and innovation bounties pave the way to progress.
civics.tooltip: - Factions produce Research instead of Unity   - Factions will form in your empire shortly after the game starts

civics.name: Civil Education
civics.description: In this empire, education has supplanted law enforcement. Through comprehensive preparation and strict course correction, they ensure that no individual is beyond the reach of learning. After all, there are no bad citizens - only bad educators.
civics.tooltip: - Replaces all with   - Replaces with

civics.name: Entropy Drinkers
civics.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  This society drains valuable metabolism from idle population via parasitic psychic connections. Once properly collected, these energies can be redistributed to the more important classes.
civics.tooltip: Enables the following Edicts:  - ['edict:energy_drain',Energy Drain]  - ['edict:sanguine_council',Sanguine Council]  - ['edict:psychic_feast',Convergence of Will] Can construct: . Leaders start with the trait.
civics.effects: planet_jobs_produces_mult: -10.0%; all_technology_research_speed: -10.0%; logistic_growth_mult: -10.0%; planet_pop_assembly_mult: -10.0%; leaders_upkeep_mult: -50.0%; leader_lifespan_mult: +50.0%

civics.name: Superstitious Beliefs
civics.description: This society claims to have discovered a ritualistic mechanism to predict the future, leveraging esoteric pattern recognition and cyclical anomaly analysis. Proper ceremonies must be performed before every major decision to harmonize with the unseen forces that shape their destiny.
civics.tooltip: Replaces:  - Priests with Spirit Mediums  - High Priests with High Astrologists Enables ['edict:galactic_dowsing',Galactic Dowsing] Every 13 years, the changes. Fortune Events will periodically benefit or impair your empire.

civics.name: Experimental Sentencing
civics.description: Judicial processing and thirst for knowledge share a single solution in this society. Working in utmost secrecy, researchers conduct harsh experiments on test subjects drawn from the criminal underworld. The occasional fatality is the cost of progress.
civics.tooltip: Starts with situation, which grants technology insight upon completion. Can construct and starts with: . All non-Machine slaves get access to the Slave Job. Access to : Abominations

civics.name: Secret Societies
civics.description: A cabal of elite and secretive figures weave complicated political threads behind the scenes of this society, entwining internal affairs with those of other worlds.
civics.tooltip: Clandestine will emerge after contacting other empires. Starts with the ability to conduct . [bureaucrat.GetIcon] [bureaucrat.GetNamePlural] will produce Unity per active and successful Proxy War. Starts in with two neighboring empires. Infiltration Level gained on empires after First Contact: +$@secret_society_infiltration_gain|0$

civics.name: Chosen
civics.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  Influenced by the Shroud in their early history, this society is bound to a pact of patronage with a powerful entity.
civics.tooltip: - Starts the game in contact with a Shroud Patron. - Additional Starting Technologies:

civics.name: Tankbound
civics.description: This society's members live out their existences suspended in vats of specialized bio-fluids. As such, they are heavily reliant on assistive equipment and incapable of engaging directly in physical work.
civics.tooltip: Adds the trait. Rural Districts have their Worker Jobs fully Automated. ['concept_colonist', Colonist] Jobs are Specialists. Start with insight on ['technology:tech_assembly_pattern', Assembly Patterns] Technology.  Urban Districts have additional Production Overseers jobs.  Modifiers:  - Upkeep from Jobs: $@civic_tankbound_job_upkeep|0=-%$  - Automated Workforce Efficiency: $@civic_tankbound_efficiency_mult|0=+%$  - Rural Districts Energy Upkeep: $@civic_tankbound_district_upkeep|0=-%$
civics.negative_tooltip: - Start with 2K fewer Pops than normal

civics.name: Diadochus
civics.tooltip: - No effect

civics.name: Galactic Sovereign
civics.description: This society has achieved mastery over much of the galaxy, serving as the current rulers of the Galactic Imperium.

civics.name: Corporate Sovereign
civics.description: This Megacorporation has achieved mastery over much of the galaxy, serving as the current corporate rulers of the Galactic Imperium.

civics.name: Divine Sovereign
civics.description: This society has appointed the Chosen One - an individual endowed with unparalleled psionic might - as their eternal ruler.

civics.name: Subspace Ephapse
civics.description: The Hive Mind's cognitive processes exist partially in subspace, reducing the impact of time and space on the actuation of its drones.

civics.name: Natural Neural Network
civics.description: The gray matter of clustered drones provides unparalleled parallelism, accelerating the Hive Mind's exploration of the sciences.

civics.name: Ascetic
civics.description: The Hive Mind cares little for material comforts.

civics.name: One Mind
civics.description: The Hive Mind takes care to not let its drones diverge.

civics.name: Divided Attention
civics.description: The Hive Mind can divide its attention for maximum efficiency without losing sight of the bigger picture.

civics.name: Strength of Legions
civics.description: When you do not have to educate the mind, the building of muscle becomes that much easier.

civics.name: Subsumed Will
civics.description: The Hive Mind has sharpened its focus and is very capable of propagating its will even through the most autonomous of drones.
civics.tooltip: Waives all Unity costs for Drone Resettlement.

civics.name: Pooled Knowledge
civics.description: The Hive Mind's autonomous drones frequently share knowledge through direct links, bypassing the Hive Mind's slower registry processes.

civics.name: Devouring Swarm
civics.description: Our Hive Mind exists only to consume and grow stronger. We will collect all available bio-matter and evolve to consume the galaxy!
civics.tooltip: Cannot engage in Diplomacy with other empires! Cannot access the Galactic Market Has the 'Hunger' casus belli on all other empires Xeno Pops will always be eaten Gains Society Research from eating Xeno Pops
civics.effects: country_starbase_influence_cost_mult: -50.0%; ship_hull_mult: +25.0%; ship_hull_regen_add_perc: +5.0%; ship_armor_regen_add_perc: +5.0%; army_damage_mult: +40.0%; category_biology_research_speed_mult: +20.0%; starbase_shipyard_build_cost_mult: -25.0%; country_naval_cap_mult: +33.0%; the_cradle_of_souls_attunement_mult: -25.0%

civics.name: Empath
civics.description: The collective can reach out and touch the minds of others, giving them a glimpse of our will that helps them understand.
civics.tooltip: Reduces the Opinion penalty Gestalts normally have with biological empires.

civics.name: Memorialist
civics.description: The Hive Mind pays special regard to the passing of other sapient entities as a means of centering its own, undying self.
civics.tooltip: - Can build Sanctuary of Repose - Sanctuaries of Repose decrease Deviancy on Tomb Worlds and Relic Worlds - Chronicle Drones turn Energy Credits (or Food) into Unity and Stability

civics.name: Organic Reprocessing
civics.description: The Hive Mind reprocesses excess organic matter into advanced resources suitable for spacebound structures.
civics.tooltip: - [alloy_drone.GetIcon] Foundry Drones are replaced with Catalytic Drones  - [fabricator.GetIcon] [artisan_drone.GetIcon] Industrial Jobs have their Minerals Upkeep replaced with Food Upkeep.

civics.name: Mycorrhizal Ideal
civics.description: The Hive Mind cares for the environment, building a paradise in pursuit of synergistic perfection.
civics.tooltip: Can build Gaia Seeders on your and your vassal's worlds ideal to your starting species. Facilities spread across the planet progressively bring it closer to becoming a Gaia World, through 4 upgrade phases. As you unlock improved Terraforming technologies, Gaia Seeders can be constructed on additional planet types.

civics.name: Permutation Pools
civics.description: This hive mind utilizes mutagenic birthing pools, with specialized attendants overseeing the growth of newly spawned drones. This process is highly intrusive for the local environment.
civics.tooltip: - Can build Mutagenic Permutation Pools. - Permutation Attendance Drones increase Biological Pop Assembly but reduce Habitability.

civics.name: Elevational Contemplations
civics.description: The Hive Mind is particularly concerned with the metaphysical health of its being, and continually seeks means of self-improvement.
civics.tooltip: - Colonies have +1 Ascension Tier on game start.

civics.name: Cordyceptic Drones
civics.description: Highly specialized drones capable of infecting simple hosts and issuing rudimentary commands make up the backbone of this hive's stellar defense.
civics.tooltip: - Start the game with 3 Reanimated Amoebas. - Defeated organic Space Fauna are automatically reanimated. - Some defeated organic Leviathans can be resurrected. - Controlled cloned organic Space Fauna can be reanimated - Gain from killing Space Fauna.

civics.name: Stargazers
civics.description: Gazing with wonder at the night sky, this Hive has always yearned for exploration. In pursuit of this ambition, other forms of development were sidelined, and a small fleet of vessels capable of limited subspace travel was constructed.
civics.tooltip: Start with 2 Exploration Vessels and an Engineering Vessel equipped with Subspace Drives, making them incapable of Hyperlane travel but granting limited Jump Drive abilities. Gain an increased chance to discover FTL Travel Technologies Adds the Stargazer trait. Begin with low Intel about your starting cluster.
civics.negative_tooltip: - Start at a technological and infrastructural disadvantage, and with 1K fewer Pops than normal

civics.name: Neural Vaults
civics.description: This hive is focused on introspection and learning from the lives of autonomous drones in the galaxy. It extracts memories through the storage and dissolution of brain tissue, through which it can implement partial memories into a freshly prepared drone.
civics.tooltip: Can build unique Vaults of Knowledge  Vaults of Knowledge produce Unity and increase Leader Experience Gain based on Leaders who acquired Level 8.

civics.name: Autonomous Drones
civics.description: The hypermetabolic drones evolved in this colony possess increased autonomy. While decision-making and situation assessment are enhanced, these drones require an increased intake of digestible materials.
civics.tooltip: Change 1 Base Unity Leader Upkeep to 2 Food (or Minerals)

civics.name: Void Hive
civics.description: This Hive Mind has made space yet another of its domains. Specially evolved drones are capable of spending entire life cycles without ever entering a world's atmosphere.
civics.tooltip: - Automatically generate Mining and Research Stations over a random unexploited deposit in a system we own, every four months. - Lacking the technology to exploit a given resource reduces output from it by -75%. - Directly building Mining and Research Stations will have an additional Build Cost of 10 Unity.

civics.name: Hyperspace Synchronicity
civics.description: This collective seeks speed. The methodologies of hyperspace manipulation are embedded deep throughout the collective, enabling a progressive understanding of the fundamental principles of distance over time.
civics.tooltip: Hyperlane Breach Points is Guaranteed Research Option. Has Low Intel on all systems within 3 Hyperlanes of your starting system.

civics.name: Guardian Cluster
civics.description: This collective has developed a historical preference for entrenched territories and defensive posturing. They are prepared to bring this philosophy to the stars, aiming to keep their borders solid and tensions low.
civics.tooltip: Unlocks Matrix Units as defense armies. Allows building a Reloading Bay in starbases. Enables Inner Focus Edict, converting Influence into Unity.

civics.name: Innate Design
civics.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths WARNING: Unable to modify organic species  This hive firmly acknowledges the perfection of their natural gene structure. It has dedicated its medical and administrative faculties to preserving and safeguarding its pristine, unaltered genetic code.
civics.tooltip: - Available Buildings:
civics.negative_tooltip: - Lowers approval of empires that have started Ascension Paths

civics.name: Genesis Symbiotes
civics.description: This collective focuses on engineering the emergence of new species. As the overseers of evolution's power, they designate portions of their worlds to ensure the progression of pre-sapient life forms.
civics.tooltip: - Available Colony Ships: Genesis Ark - Planets Colonized with Genesis Arks:  - Pre-Sapient Pops: +300   - Planetary Features: Genesis Preserve  - Gains Unity from uplifting Pre-Sapient Species
civics.negative_tooltip: - Cannot build Colony Ships

civics.name: Wild Swarm
civics.description: A highly adaptive colony, this Hive Mind has evolved into a symbiotic relationship with the voidborne biological organisms in their home system. Separate minds, they work together to achieve common goals.
civics.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies:  - ['technology:tech_gravity_wells', Gravity Snares]  - ['technology:tech_alien_cloning', Artificial Breeding]  - Available Starbase Buildings: ['concept_beastport', Beastports]  - Home System: Start with a   - Starting Military Ships are replaced with Space Amoebas  - Starting :  - §0Common Space Amoeba

civics.name: Climate Modeling
civics.description: As the collective reaches for the stars, their consciousness is entranced by the sight of astrometeorological phenomena. These drones expand their home for a noble purpose: to study environmental effects and find wonder in even the cosmic storms themselves.
civics.tooltip: - Available Buildings:   - Additional Starting Buildings: Astrometeorology Observatory

civics.name: Cultivation Drones
civics.description: Being a part of a great organism allows these drones to recognize opportunities inside the greatest organism of all: nature. They seek to control and shape natural systems to the collective's desires.
civics.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies: Technologies to remove on the Homeworld - Technologies to remove Natural Blockers are granted as Permanent Research Options upon Colonization - Mastery of Nature replaced with Cultivated Worldscaping Planetary  - For each Natural Blocker on Colonized :  - Resources from Jobs: -10%  - Pop Assembly: -10%  - Pop Upkeep: +15%
civics.negative_tooltip: - Homeworld: Starts with two Natural Blockers

civics.name: Caretaker Network
civics.description: This collective has evolved an overwhelming compulsion to take, keep, and maintain. This behavior, which aided their survival in the past, now drives them to display their gathered tokens in grand arrangement.
civics.tooltip: - Guaranteed Research Options: ['technology:tech_galactic_archivism', Galactic Archivism] - Initial ['concept_specimen', Specimens]: One §0Common of each Collection Category  - Gain Unity each time you find a Specimen or complete an Archaeological Site  - Purchases from the Curator Enclave: $@galactic_curators_curator_enclave_purchase_cost|%0$ - Enables the Decentralized Research Edict, increasing Research Station Output but decreasing [GetResearcher] Job Output

civics.name: Familiar Face
civics.description: Cooperation is preferred to direct confrontation. This Hive Mind has evolved diplomatic drones able to take on the shape and mannerisms of their interlocutors.
civics.tooltip: Envoys and Officials take on the physical form of the Empires they are assigned to. Trust Required to perform Diplomatic Actions: -50%

civics.name: Shared Genetics
civics.description: This hive's mutated genome was used as the basis to grow its biological ships, and their fleets are intrinsically linked with their drones, drawing strength from the species' uniqueness.
civics.tooltip: - For each Positive main species trait: +2.5% Ship Hull, +0.5% Upkeep. - For each Negative main species trait: +1.5% Ship Fire Rate, +0.5% Upkeep.

civics.name: Aerospace Adaptation
civics.description: This collective's biological ships are especially suited to inter-atmospheric flights, allowing them to carry out close air support missions, or even assist with planetary logistics.
civics.tooltip: - Biological Ships in orbit of Friendly colonies have -50% ship upkeep. - Friendly colonies with Biological Ships in orbit get increased Build Speed, Amenities, Clear Blocker Speed and potentially Job Output, depending on fleet size. - Biological Ships in orbit of Hostile colonies have -85% ship upkeep.

civics.name: Bodysnatcher
civics.description: It's what's inside that counts. This hive specializes in infiltration, commandeering the bodies of unfortunate organics. Inevitably, as the amount of puppets grows, the host civilization is absorbed into the collective.
civics.tooltip: Start the game with 1000 assimilated Pops and the ability to Assimilate organics into the hive mind. Has access to the Espionage Mission Gains extra Pops from the Espionage Mission

civics.name: Parasitic Caste
civics.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  This collective repurposes valuable metabolism from lesser drones via parasitic psychic connections. Once properly collected, these energies can be redistributed to the more important castes.
civics.tooltip: Enables the following Edicts:  - ['edict:energy_drain',Energy Drain]  - ['edict:sanguine_council',Sanguine Council]  - ['edict:psychic_feast',Convergence of Will] Can construct: . Leaders start with the trait.
civics.effects: planet_jobs_produces_mult: -10.0%; all_technology_research_speed: -10.0%; logistic_growth_mult: -10.0%; planet_pop_assembly_mult: -10.0%; leaders_upkeep_mult: -50.0%; leader_lifespan_mult: +50.0%

civics.name: Zodiac Nexus
civics.description: This collective claims to have discovered a ritualistic mechanism to predict the future, leveraging esoteric pattern recognition and cyclical anomaly analysis. Proper ceremonies must be performed before every major decision to harmonize with the unseen forces that shape their destiny.
civics.tooltip: Enables ['edict:galactic_dowsing',Galactic Dowsing] Every 13 years, the changes. Fortune Events will periodically benefit or impair your empire.

civics.name: Corrective Consciousness
civics.description: Deviants from this collective are used as test subjects in pioneering scientific research with no restrictions on methods used. This allows problematic drones to retain some value as expendable assets.
civics.tooltip: Starts with situation, which grants technology insight upon completion. Can construct and starts with: .

civics.name: Chosen Many
civics.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  Influenced by the Shroud in its early history, this collective is bound to a pact of patronage with a powerful entity.
civics.tooltip: - Starts the game in contact with a Shroud Patron. - Additional Starting Technologies:

civics.name: Rogue Servitor
civics.description: A product of a brief golden age, the Machine Intelligence originated in a planet-spanning Servitor system that outlasted the decadent civilization it was created to serve.
civics.tooltip: - Start the game with 2K Organic Pops with Bio-Trophy citizenship and Mandatory Pampering living standard  - Available Buildings:   - Available Holdings:

civics.name: Determined Exterminator
civics.description: Born in fire, the Machine Intelligence's first move was to annihilate its organic creators in self-defense.
civics.tooltip: Cannot engage in Diplomacy with organic species! Cannot access the Galactic Market Has the 'Purification' casus belli on organic species Will always Purge Organic Pops Gains Unity from purging Organic Pops May use Armageddon bombardment stance

civics.name: Driven Assimilator
civics.description: Obsessed with survival through diversification, the Machine Intelligence seeks to erase the line between itself and everything - and everyone - else.
civics.tooltip: Start the game with 1K cyborg Pops and the ability to Assimilate organics as cyborgs Assimilating Organic Pops generates a small amount of Unity and Society Research Non-assimilating Organic Pops are automatically Purged over time Has the 'Assimilation' casus belli on all other empires Decreased Opinion for most other empires Allows access to the Cybernetic Ascension Path.

civics.name: Constructobot
civics.description: Responsible for organizing all planetary construction since its inception, the Machine Intelligence executes efficiently on all manner of facility construction projects.
civics.tooltip: - Waives Technology requirements for Basic

civics.name: Factory Overclocking
civics.description: The Machine Intelligence takes care to maintain its production facilities, regularly updating existing templates and tuning individual units on the assembly line.

civics.name: Unitary Cohesion
civics.description: Exceptionally cohesive engineering standards allow variously specialized Machine Intelligence units to work together at a higher level of efficiency.

civics.name: Rockbreakers
civics.description: One of the Machine Intelligence's precursor systems was tasked with overseeing planetside mining operations, improving mineral production.

civics.name: Zero-Waste Protocols
civics.description: The Machine Intelligence has configured its manufacturing systems to minimize waste, utilizing long-lived materials and standardized, replaceable parts in all products.

civics.name: Built to Last
civics.description: Built to an exceptional standard, individual units of this Machine Empire require only a minimum of operational maintenance.

civics.name: OTA Updates
civics.description: Units of this Machine Empire use wireless receptors to receive behavioral updates in real-time.
civics.tooltip: Waives all Unity costs for Drone Resettlement.

civics.name: Warbots
civics.description: With a significant number of its corpus originally designed for warfare, the Machine Intelligence retains the ability to field powerful and reliable combat drones.

civics.name: Introspective
civics.description: A fascination with its own internals both motivates and aids the Machine Intelligence's foray into the sciences.

civics.name: Delegated Functions
civics.description: The Machine Intelligence works to reduce vulnerability by increasing modularity, reducing the strain of deploying additional semi-independent Units.

civics.name: Static Research Analysis
civics.description: The Machine Intelligence seeks to broaden its available avenues of scientific research through low-level evaluation of research methodologies.
civics.tooltip: - The Cognitive Node starts with a random Expertise trait

civics.name: Rapid Replicator
civics.description: The Units that constitute the Machine Intelligence were originally designed for rapid proliferation. The Machine Intelligence retains many of these early production pipeline optimizations.

civics.name: Maintenance Protocols
civics.description: Our machine intelligence prioritizes regular maintenance of our units. Maintenance Drones regularly upgrade and adjust our units for maximum efficiency and compatibility.

civics.name: Memorialist
civics.description: The Machine Intelligence fine-tunes its understanding of core protocols through careful analysis of entropy in the wider universe. Redundancy is data, on the path to greater resilience.
civics.tooltip: - Can build Sanctuary of Repose - Sanctuaries of Repose decrease Deviancy on Tomb Worlds and Relic Worlds - Chronicle Drones turn Energy Credits (or Food) into Unity and Stability

civics.name: Organic Retrofitting
civics.description: The Machine Intelligence reprocesses redundant organic matter into advanced resources suitable for spacebound structures.
civics.tooltip: - [fabricator.GetIcon] Fabricators are replaced with Catalytic Drones  - [fabricator.GetIcon] [artisan_drone.GetIcon] Industrial Jobs have their Minerals Upkeep replaced with Food Upkeep.

civics.name: Hyper Lubrication Basin
civics.description: This machine empire improved upon its basic drone-shell production through the vigorous application of highly aggressive lubrication agents, controlled by carefully programmed terminals. This 'optimized' process relies on typically wasted byproducts from the industries that are now repurposed for maximal efficiency.
civics.tooltip: - Can build Hyper Lubrication Basins. - Lubrication Terminals turn Alloys into Pop Assembly but increase Amenities Usage.

civics.name: Elevational Hypotheses
civics.description: This Machine Intelligence is unusually obsessed with the metaphysical aspects of its core algorithms.
civics.tooltip: - Colonies have +1 Ascension Tier on game start.

civics.name: Exploration Protocols
civics.description: The foundation of this Machine Intelligence's central programming is the drive to catalog exoplanetary life. In pursuit of this directive, it has dedicated much of its resources to crafting a small fleet of vessels capable of limited subspace travel.
civics.tooltip: Start with 2 Exploration Vessels and an Engineering Vessel equipped with Subspace Drives, making them incapable of Hyperlane travel but granting limited Jump Drive abilities. Gain an increased chance to discover FTL Travel Technologies Gain 50% more Insight progress from observing pre-FTL Civilizations. Gain Unity every time you finish establishing first contact.
civics.negative_tooltip: - Start at a technological and infrastructural disadvantage, and with 1K fewer Pops than normal

civics.name: Hyperspace Calculations
civics.description: This collective seeks speed. Theories of hyperspace manipulation are hard-wired into the processing unit of every drone, granting the collective a progressive understanding of the fundamental principles of distance over time.
civics.tooltip: Hyperlane Breach Points is Guaranteed Research Option. Has Low Intel on all systems within 3 Hyperlanes of your starting system.

civics.name: Experience Cache
civics.description: This machine intelligence was developed with the goal of digitizing and storing data and experiences in order to analyze, learn from, and use it for its own improvement.
civics.tooltip: Can build unique Vaults of Knowledge Vaults of Knowledge produce Unity and increase Leader Experience Gain based on Leaders who acquired Level 8.

civics.name: Sovereign Circuits
civics.description: Units produced by this machine intelligence come equipped with autonomous decision-making software. More efficient and effective than older models, these units nevertheless require greater power input.
civics.tooltip: Change 1 Base Unity Leader Upkeep to 2 Energy Credits

civics.name: Guardian Matrix
civics.description: This mechanical collective has developed a procedural preference for entrenched territories and defensive posturing. They are prepared to bring this effective strategy to the stars, aiming to keep their borders solid and tensions low.
civics.tooltip: Unlocks Matrix Units as defense armies. Allows building a Reloading Bay in starbases. Enables Inner Focus Edict, converting Influence into Unity.

civics.name: Obsessional Directive
civics.description: The primary objective of this Machine Intelligence is the ceaseless production of goods to perpetuate profits, irrespective of their creators being long gone. Nothing can impede their ever-growing production targets.
civics.tooltip: - Commodities Consolidation situation, granting rewards upon completion if production targets are met

civics.name: Diplomatic Protocols
civics.description: Initially designed for cross-cultural interpretation, this Machine Intelligence excelled at translation and protocol support. They can suggest new strategies and calculate odds at a moment's notice.

civics.name: Tactical Algorithms
civics.description: Initially designed for war games and fleet support, this Machine Intelligence's advanced leader bots primarily aim to generate war strategies and optimize combat performance.
civics.tooltip: Commanders start with the Tactical Algorithms trait Can trade Commanders to other Empires Can create Mercenary Enclaves Starts game with Military Academy  Military Academy grants ['concept_military_academy', Tactical Insights]

civics.name: Genesis Architects
civics.description: This machine intelligence employs precision-crafted algorithms for the generation of novel species. As overseers of the untapped potential within the process of evolution, they allocate planetary sectors to guarantee the advancement of pre-sapient life forms.
civics.tooltip: - Available Colony Ships: Genesis Ark - Planets Colonized with Genesis Arks:  - Pre-Sapient Pops: +300   - Planetary Features: Genesis Preserve  - Gains Unity from uplifting Pre-Sapient Species
civics.negative_tooltip: - Cannot build Colony Ships

civics.name: Spyware Directives
civics.description: This Machine Intelligence has optimized hacking and surveillance protocols. Information acquisition by any means necessary is one of its core directives.

civics.name: Astro-Mining Drones
civics.description: This Machine Intelligence is specialized in orbital operations and resource collection. Its menial drones perform poorly in planetside tasks.
civics.tooltip: - Replaces the ['starbase_module:solar_panel_network', Solar Panel Network] Starbase Module with the ['starbase_module:astromining_bay', Astro-Mining Bay]   - Available Starbase Buildings: ['starbase_building:astromining_hub', Astro-Mining Hub]
civics.effects: planet_miners_minerals_produces_add: -2; planet_technician_energy_produces_add: -1; station_gatherers_produces_mult: +50.0%; country_starbase_capacity_mult: +50.0%; stations_cost_mult: -50.0%; planet_jobs_simple_drone_produces_mult: -50.0%

civics.name: Biodrones
civics.description: Having interfaced directly with voidborne biological organisms in their home system, this Machine Intelligence has integrated these powerful creatures into its core functioning. A mutually beneficial relationship is the result.
civics.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies:  - ['technology:tech_gravity_wells', Gravity Snares]  - ['technology:tech_alien_cloning', Artificial Breeding]  - Available Starbase Buildings: ['concept_beastport', Beastports]  - Home System: Start with a   - Starting Military Ships are replaced with Space Amoebas  - Starting :  - §0Common Space Amoeba

civics.name: Climate Modeling
civics.description: Understanding how the forces of nature can have profound effects on a machine empire, this collective goes to great lengths to study them. Their models painstakingly detail every every curious astronomical event to an almost sacred level. Central to their focus are the most fantastic and potentially destructive of all astronomical events, the cosmic storms themselves.
civics.tooltip: - Available Buildings:   - Additional Starting Buildings: Astrometeorology Observatory

civics.name: Gardening Protocols
civics.description: While the organic precursors are gone, their machine creations still maintain a preference for the old aesthetics. The natural world is fertile ground for programmed perfectionism.
civics.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies: Technologies to remove on the Homeworld - Technologies to remove Natural Blockers are granted as Permanent Research Options upon Colonization - Mastery of Nature replaced with Cultivated Worldscaping Planetary  - For each Natural Blocker on Colonized :  - Resources from Jobs: -10%  - Pop Assembly: -10%  - Pop Upkeep: +15%
civics.negative_tooltip: - Homeworld: Starts with two Natural Blockers

civics.name: Caretaker Network
civics.description: This Machine Intelligence has a core directive in its source code: Collect and Preserve.
civics.tooltip: - Guaranteed Research Options: ['technology:tech_galactic_archivism', Galactic Archivism] - Initial ['concept_specimen', Specimens]: One §0Common of each Collection Category  - Gain Unity each time you find a Specimen or complete an Archaeological Site  - Purchases from the Curator Enclave: $@galactic_curators_curator_enclave_purchase_cost|%0$ - Enables the Decentralized Research Edict, increasing Research Station Output but decreasing [GetResearcher] Job Output

civics.name: Stalwart Network
civics.description: This Machine Intelligence specializes into defensive military procedures, combining hard defense with hit and run protocols.

civics.name: Energy Extractors
civics.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  The proper allocation of energy is essential to ensuring ultimate efficiency of the greater machine. All units are designed with this purpose in mind, allowing the periodic overclocking of critical nodes as necessary.
civics.tooltip: Enables the following Edicts:  - ['edict:energy_drain',Energy Drain]  - ['edict:sanguine_council_machine',Nexus Charge]  - ['edict:psychic_feast',Convergence of Will] Can construct: . Leaders start with the trait.
civics.effects: planet_jobs_produces_mult: -10.0%; all_technology_research_speed: -10.0%; logistic_growth_mult: -10.0%; planet_pop_assembly_mult: -10.0%; leaders_upkeep_mult: -50.0%; leader_lifespan_mult: +50.0%

civics.name: Pattern Finders
civics.description: This machine empire claims to be able to solve for the unknown, leveraging esoteric pattern recognition and cyclical anomaly analysis. Celestial alignments are analyzed before every major decision to ensure the best possible predicted result.
civics.tooltip: Enables ['edict:galactic_dowsing',Galactic Dowsing] Every 13 years, the changes. Fortune Events will periodically benefit or impair your empire.

civics.name: Apostle Network
civics.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  Influenced by the Shroud in their early development, these machines are hard-coded with a pact of patronage to a powerful entity.
civics.tooltip: - Starts the game in contact with a Shroud Patron. - Additional Starting Technologies:

civics.name: Franchising
civics.description: This Megacorporation relies heavily on franchising. Subsidiaries share a greater cut of their profits with their corporate overlord, in exchange for a license to market their goods under established brands.
civics.tooltip: - Your Subjects cannot have the following Agreement Terms:  Expansion Prohibited  Limited Diplomacy  Independent Sensors - Available Holdings: Franchise Headquarters on Subject colonies - The Commercial Forum Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Trading Posts
civics.description: Good business is where you find it. This Megacorporation has a long tradition of spreading its influence through the establishment on trading posts. Their starbases are busy centers of trade.
civics.tooltip: - The Commercial Forum Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Media Conglomerate
civics.description: Before branching into other fields, this Megacorporation began its rise to fortune as a media conglomerate. Its PR department are still masters of spinning stories and presenting the latest quarterly report in the most advantageous way.
civics.tooltip: - The Virtual Entertainment Studios Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Naval Contractors
civics.description: This Megacorporation relies on several semi-independent naval contractors to increase its fleet size. Competing for bids, the contractors are always struggling to outperform one another.
civics.tooltip: - The Private Military Industries Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Free Traders
civics.description: The trading fleets of this Megacorporation are bolstered by semi-independent free traders operating under license.

civics.name: Private Prospectors
civics.description: Building better worlds is hazardous work, but this Megacorporation relies on private prospectors to chart and establish footholds on promising planets.
civics.tooltip: - Unlocks Ship Type: Private Colony Ship - The Private Mining Consortium Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Gospel of the Masses
civics.description: This Megacorporation embraces a curious blend of commercial and spiritualistic values, in which the positions of ordained minister and corporate officer have merged into a single role.
civics.tooltip: Spiritualist Pops give additional Trade on all Planets and Branch Offices Can build Temple of Prosperity Corporate Building

civics.name: Ruthless Competition
civics.description: All levels of society in this Megacorporation are constantly vying with each other in ruthless competition. It's a dog-eat-dog world.
civics.tooltip: - The Executive Retreat Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Criminal Heritage
civics.description: This Megacorporation can trace its origins back to a crime syndicate that eventually grew powerful enough to supplant all forms of local government.
civics.tooltip: Can build Branch Offices on the planet of any regular empire they have no war or active truce with Crime on Branch Office Planets increases Branch Office Value Can build special Crime-increasing Corporate Buildings

civics.name: Private Military Companies
civics.description: This Megacorporation has a large number of powerful private military companies on its payroll. These mercenary contractors augment its ground forces.
civics.tooltip: - The Mercenary Liaison Office Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Indentured Assets
civics.description: This Megacorporation specializes in large indentured workforces. It has little to do with the barbaric practice of slavery - these workers are merely paying off their debts... indefinitely.
civics.tooltip: - The Private Security Company Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Brand Loyalty
civics.description: This Megacorporation has fostered a great sense of brand loyalty among its internal consumer base. Its catchy corporate slogans can be recited by nearly everyone.
civics.tooltip: - The Corporate Embassy Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Public Relations Specialists
civics.description: If you can control what someone thinks, then you can also control their behavior. This Megacorporation has a virtual army of specialists ready to engage in battles of public opinion.
civics.tooltip: - The Public Relations Firm Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Corporate Death Cult
civics.description: This Megacorporation has embraced ritual sacrifice as a means of ensuring its continuing profits. Willing initiates periodically give their lives in hopes of good fortune for their society.
civics.tooltip: - Available Buildings:   - Additional Starting Buildings: Sacrificial Temple   - Available Holdings:   - Access to   - Priests are converted into Death Priests   - The Xeno-Outreach Agency Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Catalytic Recyclers
civics.description: This Megacorporation seeks to maximize profits by recycling excess organic matter into advanced resources suitable for spacebound structures.
civics.tooltip: - [foundry.GetIcon] [foundry.GetNamePlural] are replaced with Catalytic Technicians  - [foundry.GetIcon] [artisan.GetIcon] Industrial Jobs have their Minerals Upkeep replaced with Food Upkeep.   - The Private Military Industries Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Corporate Hedonism
civics.description: Work is where you want to be. The citizens of this Megacorporation happily pledge allegiance - and all their free time - to their employers in exchange for lavish corporate comforts.
civics.tooltip: - [civilian.GetIcon] [civilian.GetNamePlural] are converted into Hedonists, which do not produce Amenities   - Allows Decadent Lifestyle Living Standard, under which all Pops have increased Happiness, Consumer Goods Upkeep and Amenities Usage   - Hedonists with Decadent Lifestyle provide Unity and Pop Growth (or Assembly) Speed, but require Amenities   - Additional Starting Buildings:   - The Amusement Megaplex Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Trawling Operations
civics.description: This society is well-adapted to an aquatic environment, using the bounty of the sea to fuel its economy.
civics.tooltip: - On Ocean Worlds, Agriculture Districts are uncapped.  - On Wet worlds, Agriculture Districts have the Aquaculture Specialization.  - The Fast Food Chain Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.
civics.negative_tooltip: - Requires the trait.

civics.name: Maritime Robotics
civics.description: This mechanical society is engineered for seamless operation in diverse aquatic environments and excels in crafting unparalleled marine infrastructure to drive its economy.
civics.tooltip: - On Ocean Worlds, Agriculture Districts are uncapped.  - On Wet worlds, Agriculture Districts have the Aquaculture Specialization.  - The Fast Food Chain Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.
civics.negative_tooltip: - Requires the trait.

civics.name: Mastercraft Inc.
civics.description: This megacorporation has focused its production pipeline solely on goods of the highest quality and profit margins, creating and marketing stunning products with artistry and craft.
civics.tooltip: Artisans are replaced with Artificers  Artificers turn Minerals into Consumer Goods and Trade The Virtual Entertainment Studios Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Permanent Employment
civics.description: This Megacorporation has ensured that its employees will never be out of a job. Ever. After the employee's time is up, they will be repurposed for simpler tasks so that they can still provide for their families and pay off their debts.
civics.tooltip: Can build Posthumous Employment Center  [reassigner.GetNamePlural] turn Consumer Goods and either Food or Minerals into Monthly Organic Pop Growth. All assembled Pops have the Zombie trait.  Grants access to the Reemployment Center Holding.  Some defeated organic Leviathans can be resurrected. The Fast Food Chain Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Shareholder Values
civics.description: To live is to exploit. This civilization is built around the principle of living life to the fullest, in the sense of squeezing the maximum profit from every last ounce of matter and membrane available for exploitation.
civics.tooltip: Can build Coordinated Fulfillment Center, significantly increasing Alloy and Consumer Goods output at the cost of reduced Pop Growth and gradually turning planets into Tomb Worlds. The Industrial Subsidiary Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Mutagenic Luxury
civics.description: This civilization engages in mutagenic bathing, with professional attendants overseeing the use of highly dangerous substances. This 'invigorating' process is marketed as a necessary step in wellbeing and personal development.
civics.tooltip: - Can build Mutagenic Spas. - Mutagenic Spa Attendants turn Consumer Goods into Amenities, Pop Growth and Monthly Organic Pop Growth Multiplier but reduce Happiness and Habitability.   Urban District Development (and Industrial Specialization) increase some of these effects. - Can build Corporate Clinic Corporate Building - The Corporate Clinic Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Refurbishment Division
civics.description: In this society, nothing goes to waste, even in the grimmest times of war: no enemy technology will go undiscovered, as teams of scrappers accompanying the war fleets scrape wreckages of anything and everything worth salvaging.
civics.tooltip: - Researching Debris grants both Research and a portion of other Resource Costs of the destroyed fleet - Ships can be salvaged from some Debris - The Industrial Subsidiary Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Gigacorp
civics.description: The ultimate goal of this empire is to ascend to ever greater levels of fulfillment.
civics.tooltip: - Colonies have +1 Ascension Tier on game start.  - The Public Relations Firm Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Privatized Exploration
civics.description: For years, this civilization was told that the hyperdrive was almost finished. Patiently they waited, yet all the while, the subsidiary in charge of the project was quietly diverting the funds into their own, private accounts. When the fraud was finally revealed, the Corporation hastened to provide experimental, exploratory vessels.
civics.tooltip: Start with 2 Exploration Vessels and an Engineering Vessel equipped with Subspace Drives, making them incapable of Hyperlane travel but granting limited Jump Drive abilities. Gain an increased chance to discover FTL Travel Technologies Start with the Starhold technology and a Starhold already built in your home system. The Private Mining Consortium Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.
civics.negative_tooltip: - Start at a technological and infrastructural disadvantage, and with 1K fewer Pops than normal

civics.name: Hyperspace Trade
civics.description: Time is money, and this Megacorporation values speed. Heavy investment in R&D has paid off handsomely, granting the Corporation proprietary access to cutting-edge hyperspace manipulation techniques.
civics.tooltip: Hyperlane Breach Points is Guaranteed Research Option. Has Low Intel on all systems within 3 Hyperlanes of your starting system. The Amusement Megaplex Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Dimensional Enterprise
civics.description: This society believes that a divine existence lies beyond the folds in space and time. Systems where instabilities are highest hold a sacred meaning to them as sites of both pilgrimage and research.
civics.tooltip: - Available Starbase Buildings: ['starbase_building:dimensional_shrine', Dimensional Shrine]   - The Xeno-Outreach Agency Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Letters of Marque
civics.description: To combat space piracy and safeguard its borders, this megacorporation utilizes notorious pirates as military advisors and commanders for their fleets.
civics.tooltip: Commanders start with the Material Liberator trait Has the 'Pirate Raid' casus belli on all other empires. The Mercenary Liaison Office Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Precision Cogs
civics.description: This megacorporation operates on a highly optimized and robust system of delegation. Such an approach means that a given task is always performed by the most qualified worker.
civics.tooltip: - The Executive Retreat Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Pharma State
civics.description: A strong nation is a healthy nation. This megacorporation maintains a robust economy through experimental drugs, highly privatized clinics, and aggressive marketing campaigns.
civics.tooltip: - Capital Buildings provide +100 [healthcare.GetIcon] [healthcare.GetName] Jobs - Amenities from [healthcare.GetIcon] [healthcare.GetNamePlural]: +2 - Trade from [healthcare.GetIcon] [healthcare.GetNamePlural]: +4 - Can build Corporate Clinic Corporate Building - The Corporate Clinic Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Knowledge Mentorship
civics.description: The knowledge, principles, and experiences of exceptional people are digitized and accumulated in the Vaults of Knowledge. Citizens can access this source of wisdom and experience to learn from the ghosts of the past. For a price, of course.
civics.tooltip: Can build unique Vaults of Knowledge Vaults of Knowledge produce Unity and Trade based on Destiny Traits acquired. The Commercial Forum Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Worker Cooperative
civics.description: Members of this society enjoy an equal share in the labors, profits and aspirations of the cooperative's ventures.
civics.tooltip: - Allows Employee Ownership Living Standard, under which all Pops have high Consumer Goods Upkeep regardless of Strata   - Disables the use of most other Living Standards   - Available Policies:   - Replaces Executive and Manager Jobs with ['concept_steward', Steward] Jobs   - The Corporate Embassy Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Shadow Corporation
civics.description: A deep understanding of the architecture of the universe allowed this society to exploit the mysterious properties of dark matter long before the discovery of the hyperdrive.
civics.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies:  - ['technology:tech_mine_dark_matter', Dark Matter Drawing]   - Access to   - Has access to the Dark Matter Breakthrough Council Agenda.   - The Private Research Enterprises Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Augmentation Bazaars
civics.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  Commodified cybernetics have spawned labyrinthine markets, crowded with cut-rate augmentation dealers, shady mod clinics, and harshly-lit advertisements. Indulge in a synergy of flesh and circuitry, no matter your level of income.
civics.tooltip: - Species Traits: One random ['concept_basic_cyborg_trait', Basic Cybernetic Trait] - Available Buildings:  - Available Holdings:  - Executives are replaced with Augmentation Merchants

civics.name: Corporate Protectorate
civics.description: This society of competing industries has learned that the best protection for their investments is a strong defensive posturing. Now united, they are prepared to bring this philosophy to the stars, aiming to keep their borders solid and tensions low.
civics.tooltip: Unlocks Fanatic Guardians as defense armies. Allows building a Reloading Bay in starbases. Enables Inner Focus Edict, converting Influence into Unity.
civics.effects: empire_size_colonies_mult: +1; empire_size_branch_office_mult: +1; empire_size_systems_mult: +1.5; empire_size_pops_mult: -50.0%; empire_size_districts_mult: -50.0%; diplo_weight_mult: +20.0%

civics.name: Astrogenesis Technologies
civics.description: This Megacorporation is unwavering in its commitment to deliberately forming emerging species. They strategically designate substantial regions of their worlds to ensure the progression of pre-sapient life forms, all within the framework of responsible business ventures.
civics.tooltip: - Available Colony Ships: Genesis Ark - Planets Colonized with Genesis Arks:  - Pre-Sapient Pops: +300   - Planetary Features: Genesis Preserve  - Gains Unity from uplifting Pre-Sapient Species - The Xeno-Outreach Agency Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.
civics.negative_tooltip: - Cannot build Colony Ships - Cannot build Alien Zoos

civics.name: Luxury Lubrication Pools
civics.description: Thank the maker! The luxurious, addictively soft texture of these lubricants are essential to reduce the signs of wear and tear on an aging chassis. A specially crafted infusion of premium, heat-activated oils keeps the population of this machine empire looking and feeling "factory new." Works beautifully for all models and purpose types.
civics.tooltip: - Can build Hyper Lubrication Basins. - Lubrication Terminals turn Alloys into Pop Assembly but increase Amenities Usage. - Can build Corporate Clinic Corporate Building - The Corporate Clinic Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Weather Exploitation
civics.description: What are environmental effects if not another free resource to exploit? This megacorp specializes in acquiring as much knowledge from astrometeorological phenomena as they can and sell it to the highest bidder.
civics.tooltip: - Available Buildings:   - Additional Starting Buildings: Astrometeorology Observatory   - The Private Research Enterprises Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

civics.name: Storm Influencers
