all.name: Necrophage
all.description: This civilization evolved as a parasite, forced to feed off other sapient life forms to sustain itself. As it arrives on the galactic stage, other species will either be brought into the fold, or become its food. For the necrophage, there can be no other way.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld:  - Species Traits:  - Prepatent Pops: 1.2K  - : Replaced with
all.negative_tooltip: - Only Necrophage Pops can be Rulers or recruited as Leaders

all.name: Remnants
all.description: This civilization once spanned the void, controlling much of the galaxy. They were eventually defeated and almost destroyed, but after a long period of destitution they are returning to the stars.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld:  - (Size: 22)  - ['concept_ruined_arcology', Ruined Arcology]: +6 [GetRemnantAncientRelicEffect]

all.name: Shattered Ring
all.description: This civilization inhabits a Ring World built by unknown forerunners. If it can be understood and fully repaired it will grant them great power.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld:  - : Replaced with Colonizable Ring World Segments that have Blockers decreasing Habitability  - Species Traits:

all.name: Void Dwellers
all.description: This civilization has made its home in space for as long as it has maintained records - life in a typical planetary environment is anathema to them. They live in several orbital habitats that were only recently united.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld:  - Species Traits:  - ['concept_void_dweller', Void Dweller]  - ['concept_habitat_preference', Habitat Preference] - Additional Starting Technologies: ['concept_habitat_1', Orbital Habitats] - Guaranteed Research Options: ['concept_habitat_2', Habitat Expansion] - : Resource-rich systems instead of Colonizable Planets  - Can construct advanced housing buildings on Habitats - Waives Technology requirements for Basic District Specialization on Habitats

all.name: Voidforged
all.description: At first, the creators of this machine civilization designed them for eternal space travel, fully optimizing them to function seamlessly in zero gravity environments. After enduring eons of isolation, these machines have recently restored unity among the orbital habitats scattered throughout their home system.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld:  - Species Traits:  - ['concept_void_dweller_2', Zero-G Optimized]  - ['concept_habitat_preference', Habitat Preference] - Additional Starting Technologies: ['concept_habitat_1', Orbital Habitats] - Guaranteed Research Options: ['concept_habitat_2', Habitat Expansion] - : Resource-rich systems instead of Colonizable Planets  - Can construct advanced housing buildings on Habitats - Waives Technology requirements for Basic District Specialization on Habitats
all.negative_tooltip: - Requires Machine Template System Technology for Species Modification

all.name: Scion
all.description: A Fallen Empire has meddled in the development of this civilization for thousands of years, guiding them onto a path of their choosing.
all.tooltip: - ['concept_scion', Scion] of a Overlord - Home System: Connected to Overlord's capital via a  - Fallen Empire present in the galaxy regardless of Galaxy settings - Chance of receiving powerful gifts from Overlord

all.name: On the Shoulders of Giants
all.description: This civilization has hidden boons in their solar system, placed there in a distant past by a mysterious benefactor.
all.tooltip: - Home System: related to a mysterious benefactor
all.negative_tooltip: - Precursor Event Chains blocked until this mystery is solved

all.name: Common Ground
all.description: This civilization established early contact with their immediate alien neighbors. Finding strength in their differences, they soon decided to face the future, and whatever it might bring, together.
all.tooltip: - Leader of a non-Hegemony  - : Replaced with Federation members - Additional Starting Technologies:

all.name: Hegemon
all.description: This civilization established early contact with their immediate alien neighbors. Gradually, over the span of a century, they masterminded the birth of an interstellar union in which they would have a dominant role.
all.tooltip: - Leader of a  - : Replaced with Federation members - Additional Starting Technologies:

all.name: Doomsday
all.description: WARNING: Challenging Origin This civilization's homeworld is highly unstable, and it is only a matter of time before it explodes. Their only hope is to seek refuge elsewhere before it is too late.
all.negative_tooltip: - Homeworld: Planetary Modifier  - : Are NOT spawned

all.name: Calamitous Birth
all.description: Not native to their 'homeworld', these Lithoids arrived when a meteorite slammed into the planet and killed off most of the native life.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld:  -   - : +4 - Available Colony Ships: Lithoid Meteorites - Planets Colonized with Lithoid Meteorites:  - Buried Lithoids: +2  - Planetary Modifiers:  - Available Holdings: ['concept_experimental_crater', Experimental Crater] on (Subject) colonies

all.name: Life-Seeded
all.description: This civilization's home is a paradise, possibly designed just for them.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld: (Size: 30) with Rare Planetary Features - Species Traits:
all.negative_tooltip: - : Are NOT spawned

all.name: Post-Apocalyptic
all.description: Baptized by nuclear fire, this civilization has faced total annihilation - and survived. Devastated yet unbroken, they have rebuilt civilization from the ashes of their old world.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld:  - Species Traits:

all.name: Radioactive Rovers
all.description: In the aftermath of a devastating nuclear disaster, these machines emerged as the sole survivors of a once-flourishing civilization. By continuing to fulfill their designated purpose, they gradually rebuilt society from the uninhabitable ashes of their old world.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld:  - Species Traits:

all.name: Clone Army
all.description: A species of short-lived and infertile soldier clones exceptionally proficient in matters of war, left masterless and alone to question their engineered purpose and uncertain fate.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld: : +2  - Species Traits:  - Additional Starting Technologies:   - ['concept_cloning', Cloning]   - ['concept_gene_banks', Gene Banks]

all.name: Resource Consolidation
all.description: This Machine Intelligence has long-since consolidated all resources in their home system into their capital world, covering it entirely with machinery.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld:  -   - Planetary Features:   - If combined with the Driven Assimilator Civic:  - Planetary Features:  - Waives Technology requirements for the Machine Worlds Ascension Perk
all.negative_tooltip: - Home System: Planets are ['concept_pc_molten', Molten Worlds] or ['concept_pc_barren', Barren Worlds] devoid of any resources

all.name: Hard Reset
all.description: WARNING: Challenging Origin  Abruptly severed from the Machine that assimilated them, this nascent civilization has fought fiercely to establish its own presence in the galaxy.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld:  - Planetary Modifiers:  - Home System: Contains a with an related to a decimated ['concept_preftl_civilizations', Pre-FTL Civilization] - Species Traits:  - Limited access to Traits  -   -

all.name: Mechanist
all.description: This civilization has been preoccupied with the idea of metallic automatons since the early Steam Age. Although many said it could not be done, the first true robots left the assembly lines long before even rudimentary space flight was achieved.
all.tooltip: - ['concept_robots', Robot] Pops: 800  - Mechanical Trait:  - Homeworld: ['concept_robot_assembly_plant', Robot Assembly Plant] - Additional Starting Technologies:  - ['concept_powered_exoskeletons', Powered Exoskeletons]  - ['concept_robotic_workers', Artificial Workforce] - Guaranteed Research Options: ['concept_robomodding', Machine Template System]

all.name: Syncretic Evolution
all.description: A second species forms an integral part of this civilization. They are big, strong, and most of them have the intelligence of a particularly dim-witted child. Ancient wars have culled their species of their most aggressive tendencies, leaving them quite servile.
all.tooltip: - Organic Pops with Trait: 1.2K

all.name: Tree of Life
all.description: This Hive evolved in a symbiotic relationship with a vast Tree. The Tree grants them many benefits, but its loss would cripple them.
all.tooltip: - Homeworld:  - Colonized Planets: Planetary Feature - Colonies without the Tree of Life Sapling: Planetary Decision - Available Holdings: ['concept_tree_of_life_holding', Tree of Life Sprout] on Subject colonies
all.negative_tooltip: - Colonies without the Tree of Life Sapling: Planetary Modifier

all.name: Fruitful Partnership
all.description: This verdant civilization has developed a unique synergy with spaceborne fauna. By offering their fruits to these creatures, they entice the seed dispersers to aid their colonization efforts.
all.tooltip: - Space Fauna: Disperse ['concept_seed_pod', Seed Pods] throughout the galaxy  - Available Starbase Buildings: ['concept_sm_feeder', Starseed Gardens]  - Available Bombardment Stances: ['concept_seed_bombing' ] - Home System: ['concept_tiyanki' ] in a neighboring system

all.name: Galactic Doorstep
all.description: This civilization has a dormant Gateway in their home system - potential technological benefit, or a looming menace?
all.tooltip: - Home System: Dormant

all.name: Lost Colony
all.description: This civilization originated as a lost and forgotten colony, separated from its homeworld long ago. The struggling colonists endured many hardships before they could build up the necessary technological and industrial base that would allow for a return to space.
all.tooltip: - Starting Planet: Planetary Modifier - An of the same species is present in the galaxy
all.negative_tooltip: - Starting planet is NOT this empire's homeworld.

all.name: Diadochus
all.tooltip: - No effect

all.name: Galactic Sovereign
all.description: This society has achieved mastery over much of the galaxy, serving as the current rulers of the Galactic Imperium.

all.name: Corporate Sovereign
all.description: This Megacorporation has achieved mastery over much of the galaxy, serving as the current corporate rulers of the Galactic Imperium.

all.name: Divine Sovereign
all.description: This society has appointed the Chosen One - an individual endowed with unparalleled psionic might - as their eternal ruler.

all.name: Subspace Ephapse
all.description: The Hive Mind's cognitive processes exist partially in subspace, reducing the impact of time and space on the actuation of its drones.

all.name: Natural Neural Network
all.description: The gray matter of clustered drones provides unparalleled parallelism, accelerating the Hive Mind's exploration of the sciences.

all.name: Ascetic
all.description: The Hive Mind cares little for material comforts.

all.name: One Mind
all.description: The Hive Mind takes care to not let its drones diverge.

all.name: Divided Attention
all.description: The Hive Mind can divide its attention for maximum efficiency without losing sight of the bigger picture.

all.name: Strength of Legions
all.description: When you do not have to educate the mind, the building of muscle becomes that much easier.

all.name: Subsumed Will
all.description: The Hive Mind has sharpened its focus and is very capable of propagating its will even through the most autonomous of drones.
all.tooltip: Waives all Unity costs for Drone Resettlement.

all.name: Pooled Knowledge
all.description: The Hive Mind's autonomous drones frequently share knowledge through direct links, bypassing the Hive Mind's slower registry processes.

all.name: Devouring Swarm
all.description: Our Hive Mind exists only to consume and grow stronger. We will collect all available bio-matter and evolve to consume the galaxy!
all.tooltip: Cannot engage in Diplomacy with other empires! Cannot access the Galactic Market Has the 'Hunger' casus belli on all other empires Xeno Pops will always be eaten Gains Society Research from eating Xeno Pops
all.effects: country_starbase_influence_cost_mult: -50.0%; ship_hull_mult: +25.0%; ship_hull_regen_add_perc: +5.0%; ship_armor_regen_add_perc: +5.0%; army_damage_mult: +40.0%; category_biology_research_speed_mult: +20.0%; starbase_shipyard_build_cost_mult: -25.0%; country_naval_cap_mult: +33.0%; the_cradle_of_souls_attunement_mult: -25.0%

all.name: Empath
all.description: The collective can reach out and touch the minds of others, giving them a glimpse of our will that helps them understand.
all.tooltip: Reduces the Opinion penalty Gestalts normally have with biological empires.

all.name: Memorialist
all.description: The Hive Mind pays special regard to the passing of other sapient entities as a means of centering its own, undying self.
all.tooltip: - Can build Sanctuary of Repose - Sanctuaries of Repose decrease Deviancy on Tomb Worlds and Relic Worlds - Chronicle Drones turn Energy Credits (or Food) into Unity and Stability

all.name: Organic Reprocessing
all.description: The Hive Mind reprocesses excess organic matter into advanced resources suitable for spacebound structures.
all.tooltip: - [alloy_drone.GetIcon] Foundry Drones are replaced with Catalytic Drones  - [fabricator.GetIcon] [artisan_drone.GetIcon] Industrial Jobs have their Minerals Upkeep replaced with Food Upkeep.

all.name: Mycorrhizal Ideal
all.description: The Hive Mind cares for the environment, building a paradise in pursuit of synergistic perfection.
all.tooltip: Can build Gaia Seeders on your and your vassal's worlds ideal to your starting species. Facilities spread across the planet progressively bring it closer to becoming a Gaia World, through 4 upgrade phases. As you unlock improved Terraforming technologies, Gaia Seeders can be constructed on additional planet types.

all.name: Permutation Pools
all.description: This hive mind utilizes mutagenic birthing pools, with specialized attendants overseeing the growth of newly spawned drones. This process is highly intrusive for the local environment.
all.tooltip: - Can build Mutagenic Permutation Pools. - Permutation Attendance Drones increase Biological Pop Assembly but reduce Habitability.

all.name: Elevational Contemplations
all.description: The Hive Mind is particularly concerned with the metaphysical health of its being, and continually seeks means of self-improvement.
all.tooltip: - Colonies have +1 Ascension Tier on game start.

all.name: Cordyceptic Drones
all.description: Highly specialized drones capable of infecting simple hosts and issuing rudimentary commands make up the backbone of this hive's stellar defense.
all.tooltip: - Start the game with 3 Reanimated Amoebas. - Defeated organic Space Fauna are automatically reanimated. - Some defeated organic Leviathans can be resurrected. - Controlled cloned organic Space Fauna can be reanimated - Gain from killing Space Fauna.

all.name: Stargazers
all.description: Gazing with wonder at the night sky, this Hive has always yearned for exploration. In pursuit of this ambition, other forms of development were sidelined, and a small fleet of vessels capable of limited subspace travel was constructed.
all.tooltip: Start with 2 Exploration Vessels and an Engineering Vessel equipped with Subspace Drives, making them incapable of Hyperlane travel but granting limited Jump Drive abilities. Gain an increased chance to discover FTL Travel Technologies Adds the Stargazer trait. Begin with low Intel about your starting cluster.
all.negative_tooltip: - Start at a technological and infrastructural disadvantage, and with 1K fewer Pops than normal

all.name: Neural Vaults
all.description: This hive is focused on introspection and learning from the lives of autonomous drones in the galaxy. It extracts memories through the storage and dissolution of brain tissue, through which it can implement partial memories into a freshly prepared drone.
all.tooltip: Can build unique Vaults of Knowledge  Vaults of Knowledge produce Unity and increase Leader Experience Gain based on Leaders who acquired Level 8.

all.name: Autonomous Drones
all.description: The hypermetabolic drones evolved in this colony possess increased autonomy. While decision-making and situation assessment are enhanced, these drones require an increased intake of digestible materials.
all.tooltip: Change 1 Base Unity Leader Upkeep to 2 Food (or Minerals)

all.name: Void Hive
all.description: This Hive Mind has made space yet another of its domains. Specially evolved drones are capable of spending entire life cycles without ever entering a world's atmosphere.
all.tooltip: - Automatically generate Mining and Research Stations over a random unexploited deposit in a system we own, every four months. - Lacking the technology to exploit a given resource reduces output from it by -75%. - Directly building Mining and Research Stations will have an additional Build Cost of 10 Unity.

all.name: Hyperspace Synchronicity
all.description: This collective seeks speed. The methodologies of hyperspace manipulation are embedded deep throughout the collective, enabling a progressive understanding of the fundamental principles of distance over time.
all.tooltip: Hyperlane Breach Points is Guaranteed Research Option. Has Low Intel on all systems within 3 Hyperlanes of your starting system.

all.name: Guardian Cluster
all.description: This collective has developed a historical preference for entrenched territories and defensive posturing. They are prepared to bring this philosophy to the stars, aiming to keep their borders solid and tensions low.
all.tooltip: Unlocks Matrix Units as defense armies. Allows building a Reloading Bay in starbases. Enables Inner Focus Edict, converting Influence into Unity.

all.name: Innate Design
all.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths WARNING: Unable to modify organic species  This hive firmly acknowledges the perfection of their natural gene structure. It has dedicated its medical and administrative faculties to preserving and safeguarding its pristine, unaltered genetic code.
all.tooltip: - Available Buildings:
all.negative_tooltip: - Lowers approval of empires that have started Ascension Paths

all.name: Genesis Symbiotes
all.description: This collective focuses on engineering the emergence of new species. As the overseers of evolution's power, they designate portions of their worlds to ensure the progression of pre-sapient life forms.
all.tooltip: - Available Colony Ships: Genesis Ark - Planets Colonized with Genesis Arks:  - Pre-Sapient Pops: +300   - Planetary Features: Genesis Preserve  - Gains Unity from uplifting Pre-Sapient Species
all.negative_tooltip: - Cannot build Colony Ships

all.name: Wild Swarm
all.description: A highly adaptive colony, this Hive Mind has evolved into a symbiotic relationship with the voidborne biological organisms in their home system. Separate minds, they work together to achieve common goals.
all.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies:  - ['technology:tech_gravity_wells', Gravity Snares]  - ['technology:tech_alien_cloning', Artificial Breeding]  - Available Starbase Buildings: ['concept_beastport', Beastports]  - Home System: Start with a   - Starting Military Ships are replaced with Space Amoebas  - Starting :  - §0Common Space Amoeba

all.name: Climate Modeling
all.description: As the collective reaches for the stars, their consciousness is entranced by the sight of astrometeorological phenomena. These drones expand their home for a noble purpose: to study environmental effects and find wonder in even the cosmic storms themselves.
all.tooltip: - Available Buildings:   - Additional Starting Buildings: Astrometeorology Observatory

all.name: Cultivation Drones
all.description: Being a part of a great organism allows these drones to recognize opportunities inside the greatest organism of all: nature. They seek to control and shape natural systems to the collective's desires.
all.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies: Technologies to remove on the Homeworld - Technologies to remove Natural Blockers are granted as Permanent Research Options upon Colonization - Mastery of Nature replaced with Cultivated Worldscaping Planetary  - For each Natural Blocker on Colonized :  - Resources from Jobs: -10%  - Pop Assembly: -10%  - Pop Upkeep: +15%
all.negative_tooltip: - Homeworld: Starts with two Natural Blockers

all.name: Caretaker Network
all.description: This collective has evolved an overwhelming compulsion to take, keep, and maintain. This behavior, which aided their survival in the past, now drives them to display their gathered tokens in grand arrangement.
all.tooltip: - Guaranteed Research Options: ['technology:tech_galactic_archivism', Galactic Archivism] - Initial ['concept_specimen', Specimens]: One §0Common of each Collection Category  - Gain Unity each time you find a Specimen or complete an Archaeological Site  - Purchases from the Curator Enclave: $@galactic_curators_curator_enclave_purchase_cost|%0$ - Enables the Decentralized Research Edict, increasing Research Station Output but decreasing [GetResearcher] Job Output

all.name: Familiar Face
all.description: Cooperation is preferred to direct confrontation. This Hive Mind has evolved diplomatic drones able to take on the shape and mannerisms of their interlocutors.
all.tooltip: Envoys and Officials take on the physical form of the Empires they are assigned to. Trust Required to perform Diplomatic Actions: -50%

all.name: Shared Genetics
all.description: This hive's mutated genome was used as the basis to grow its biological ships, and their fleets are intrinsically linked with their drones, drawing strength from the species' uniqueness.
all.tooltip: - For each Positive main species trait: +2.5% Ship Hull, +0.5% Upkeep. - For each Negative main species trait: +1.5% Ship Fire Rate, +0.5% Upkeep.

all.name: Aerospace Adaptation
all.description: This collective's biological ships are especially suited to inter-atmospheric flights, allowing them to carry out close air support missions, or even assist with planetary logistics.
all.tooltip: - Biological Ships in orbit of Friendly colonies have -50% ship upkeep. - Friendly colonies with Biological Ships in orbit get increased Build Speed, Amenities, Clear Blocker Speed and potentially Job Output, depending on fleet size. - Biological Ships in orbit of Hostile colonies have -85% ship upkeep.

all.name: Bodysnatcher
all.description: It's what's inside that counts. This hive specializes in infiltration, commandeering the bodies of unfortunate organics. Inevitably, as the amount of puppets grows, the host civilization is absorbed into the collective.
all.tooltip: Start the game with 1000 assimilated Pops and the ability to Assimilate organics into the hive mind. Has access to the Espionage Mission Gains extra Pops from the Espionage Mission

all.name: Parasitic Caste
all.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  This collective repurposes valuable metabolism from lesser drones via parasitic psychic connections. Once properly collected, these energies can be redistributed to the more important castes.
all.tooltip: Enables the following Edicts:  - ['edict:energy_drain',Energy Drain]  - ['edict:sanguine_council',Sanguine Council]  - ['edict:psychic_feast',Convergence of Will] Can construct: . Leaders start with the trait.
all.effects: planet_jobs_produces_mult: -10.0%; all_technology_research_speed: -10.0%; logistic_growth_mult: -10.0%; planet_pop_assembly_mult: -10.0%; leaders_upkeep_mult: -50.0%; leader_lifespan_mult: +50.0%

all.name: Zodiac Nexus
all.description: This collective claims to have discovered a ritualistic mechanism to predict the future, leveraging esoteric pattern recognition and cyclical anomaly analysis. Proper ceremonies must be performed before every major decision to harmonize with the unseen forces that shape their destiny.
all.tooltip: Enables ['edict:galactic_dowsing',Galactic Dowsing] Every 13 years, the changes. Fortune Events will periodically benefit or impair your empire.

all.name: Corrective Consciousness
all.description: Deviants from this collective are used as test subjects in pioneering scientific research with no restrictions on methods used. This allows problematic drones to retain some value as expendable assets.
all.tooltip: Starts with situation, which grants technology insight upon completion. Can construct and starts with: .

all.name: Chosen Many
all.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  Influenced by the Shroud in its early history, this collective is bound to a pact of patronage with a powerful entity.
all.tooltip: - Starts the game in contact with a Shroud Patron. - Additional Starting Technologies:

all.name: Rogue Servitor
all.description: A product of a brief golden age, the Machine Intelligence originated in a planet-spanning Servitor system that outlasted the decadent civilization it was created to serve.
all.tooltip: - Start the game with 2K Organic Pops with Bio-Trophy citizenship and Mandatory Pampering living standard  - Available Buildings:   - Available Holdings:

all.name: Determined Exterminator
all.description: Born in fire, the Machine Intelligence's first move was to annihilate its organic creators in self-defense.
all.tooltip: Cannot engage in Diplomacy with organic species! Cannot access the Galactic Market Has the 'Purification' casus belli on organic species Will always Purge Organic Pops Gains Unity from purging Organic Pops May use Armageddon bombardment stance

all.name: Driven Assimilator
all.description: Obsessed with survival through diversification, the Machine Intelligence seeks to erase the line between itself and everything - and everyone - else.
all.tooltip: Start the game with 1K cyborg Pops and the ability to Assimilate organics as cyborgs Assimilating Organic Pops generates a small amount of Unity and Society Research Non-assimilating Organic Pops are automatically Purged over time Has the 'Assimilation' casus belli on all other empires Decreased Opinion for most other empires Allows access to the Cybernetic Ascension Path.

all.name: Constructobot
all.description: Responsible for organizing all planetary construction since its inception, the Machine Intelligence executes efficiently on all manner of facility construction projects.
all.tooltip: - Waives Technology requirements for Basic

all.name: Factory Overclocking
all.description: The Machine Intelligence takes care to maintain its production facilities, regularly updating existing templates and tuning individual units on the assembly line.

all.name: Unitary Cohesion
all.description: Exceptionally cohesive engineering standards allow variously specialized Machine Intelligence units to work together at a higher level of efficiency.

all.name: Rockbreakers
all.description: One of the Machine Intelligence's precursor systems was tasked with overseeing planetside mining operations, improving mineral production.

all.name: Zero-Waste Protocols
all.description: The Machine Intelligence has configured its manufacturing systems to minimize waste, utilizing long-lived materials and standardized, replaceable parts in all products.

all.name: Built to Last
all.description: Built to an exceptional standard, individual units of this Machine Empire require only a minimum of operational maintenance.

all.name: OTA Updates
all.description: Units of this Machine Empire use wireless receptors to receive behavioral updates in real-time.
all.tooltip: Waives all Unity costs for Drone Resettlement.

all.name: Warbots
all.description: With a significant number of its corpus originally designed for warfare, the Machine Intelligence retains the ability to field powerful and reliable combat drones.

all.name: Introspective
all.description: A fascination with its own internals both motivates and aids the Machine Intelligence's foray into the sciences.

all.name: Delegated Functions
all.description: The Machine Intelligence works to reduce vulnerability by increasing modularity, reducing the strain of deploying additional semi-independent Units.

all.name: Static Research Analysis
all.description: The Machine Intelligence seeks to broaden its available avenues of scientific research through low-level evaluation of research methodologies.
all.tooltip: - The Cognitive Node starts with a random Expertise trait

all.name: Rapid Replicator
all.description: The Units that constitute the Machine Intelligence were originally designed for rapid proliferation. The Machine Intelligence retains many of these early production pipeline optimizations.

all.name: Maintenance Protocols
all.description: Our machine intelligence prioritizes regular maintenance of our units. Maintenance Drones regularly upgrade and adjust our units for maximum efficiency and compatibility.

all.name: Memorialist
all.description: The Machine Intelligence fine-tunes its understanding of core protocols through careful analysis of entropy in the wider universe. Redundancy is data, on the path to greater resilience.
all.tooltip: - Can build Sanctuary of Repose - Sanctuaries of Repose decrease Deviancy on Tomb Worlds and Relic Worlds - Chronicle Drones turn Energy Credits (or Food) into Unity and Stability

all.name: Organic Retrofitting
all.description: The Machine Intelligence reprocesses redundant organic matter into advanced resources suitable for spacebound structures.
all.tooltip: - [fabricator.GetIcon] Fabricators are replaced with Catalytic Drones  - [fabricator.GetIcon] [artisan_drone.GetIcon] Industrial Jobs have their Minerals Upkeep replaced with Food Upkeep.

all.name: Hyper Lubrication Basin
all.description: This machine empire improved upon its basic drone-shell production through the vigorous application of highly aggressive lubrication agents, controlled by carefully programmed terminals. This 'optimized' process relies on typically wasted byproducts from the industries that are now repurposed for maximal efficiency.
all.tooltip: - Can build Hyper Lubrication Basins. - Lubrication Terminals turn Alloys into Pop Assembly but increase Amenities Usage.

all.name: Elevational Hypotheses
all.description: This Machine Intelligence is unusually obsessed with the metaphysical aspects of its core algorithms.
all.tooltip: - Colonies have +1 Ascension Tier on game start.

all.name: Exploration Protocols
all.description: The foundation of this Machine Intelligence's central programming is the drive to catalog exoplanetary life. In pursuit of this directive, it has dedicated much of its resources to crafting a small fleet of vessels capable of limited subspace travel.
all.tooltip: Start with 2 Exploration Vessels and an Engineering Vessel equipped with Subspace Drives, making them incapable of Hyperlane travel but granting limited Jump Drive abilities. Gain an increased chance to discover FTL Travel Technologies Gain 50% more Insight progress from observing pre-FTL Civilizations. Gain Unity every time you finish establishing first contact.
all.negative_tooltip: - Start at a technological and infrastructural disadvantage, and with 1K fewer Pops than normal

all.name: Hyperspace Calculations
all.description: This collective seeks speed. Theories of hyperspace manipulation are hard-wired into the processing unit of every drone, granting the collective a progressive understanding of the fundamental principles of distance over time.
all.tooltip: Hyperlane Breach Points is Guaranteed Research Option. Has Low Intel on all systems within 3 Hyperlanes of your starting system.

all.name: Experience Cache
all.description: This machine intelligence was developed with the goal of digitizing and storing data and experiences in order to analyze, learn from, and use it for its own improvement.
all.tooltip: Can build unique Vaults of Knowledge Vaults of Knowledge produce Unity and increase Leader Experience Gain based on Leaders who acquired Level 8.

all.name: Sovereign Circuits
all.description: Units produced by this machine intelligence come equipped with autonomous decision-making software. More efficient and effective than older models, these units nevertheless require greater power input.
all.tooltip: Change 1 Base Unity Leader Upkeep to 2 Energy Credits

all.name: Guardian Matrix
all.description: This mechanical collective has developed a procedural preference for entrenched territories and defensive posturing. They are prepared to bring this effective strategy to the stars, aiming to keep their borders solid and tensions low.
all.tooltip: Unlocks Matrix Units as defense armies. Allows building a Reloading Bay in starbases. Enables Inner Focus Edict, converting Influence into Unity.

all.name: Obsessional Directive
all.description: The primary objective of this Machine Intelligence is the ceaseless production of goods to perpetuate profits, irrespective of their creators being long gone. Nothing can impede their ever-growing production targets.
all.tooltip: - Commodities Consolidation situation, granting rewards upon completion if production targets are met

all.name: Diplomatic Protocols
all.description: Initially designed for cross-cultural interpretation, this Machine Intelligence excelled at translation and protocol support. They can suggest new strategies and calculate odds at a moment's notice.

all.name: Tactical Algorithms
all.description: Initially designed for war games and fleet support, this Machine Intelligence's advanced leader bots primarily aim to generate war strategies and optimize combat performance.
all.tooltip: Commanders start with the Tactical Algorithms trait Can trade Commanders to other Empires Can create Mercenary Enclaves Starts game with Military Academy  Military Academy grants ['concept_military_academy', Tactical Insights]

all.name: Genesis Architects
all.description: This machine intelligence employs precision-crafted algorithms for the generation of novel species. As overseers of the untapped potential within the process of evolution, they allocate planetary sectors to guarantee the advancement of pre-sapient life forms.
all.tooltip: - Available Colony Ships: Genesis Ark - Planets Colonized with Genesis Arks:  - Pre-Sapient Pops: +300   - Planetary Features: Genesis Preserve  - Gains Unity from uplifting Pre-Sapient Species
all.negative_tooltip: - Cannot build Colony Ships

all.name: Spyware Directives
all.description: This Machine Intelligence has optimized hacking and surveillance protocols. Information acquisition by any means necessary is one of its core directives.

all.name: Astro-Mining Drones
all.description: This Machine Intelligence is specialized in orbital operations and resource collection. Its menial drones perform poorly in planetside tasks.
all.tooltip: - Replaces the ['starbase_module:solar_panel_network', Solar Panel Network] Starbase Module with the ['starbase_module:astromining_bay', Astro-Mining Bay]   - Available Starbase Buildings: ['starbase_building:astromining_hub', Astro-Mining Hub]
all.effects: planet_miners_minerals_produces_add: -2; planet_technician_energy_produces_add: -1; station_gatherers_produces_mult: +50.0%; country_starbase_capacity_mult: +50.0%; stations_cost_mult: -50.0%; planet_jobs_simple_drone_produces_mult: -50.0%

all.name: Biodrones
all.description: Having interfaced directly with voidborne biological organisms in their home system, this Machine Intelligence has integrated these powerful creatures into its core functioning. A mutually beneficial relationship is the result.
all.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies:  - ['technology:tech_gravity_wells', Gravity Snares]  - ['technology:tech_alien_cloning', Artificial Breeding]  - Available Starbase Buildings: ['concept_beastport', Beastports]  - Home System: Start with a   - Starting Military Ships are replaced with Space Amoebas  - Starting :  - §0Common Space Amoeba

all.name: Climate Modeling
all.description: Understanding how the forces of nature can have profound effects on a machine empire, this collective goes to great lengths to study them. Their models painstakingly detail every every curious astronomical event to an almost sacred level. Central to their focus are the most fantastic and potentially destructive of all astronomical events, the cosmic storms themselves.
all.tooltip: - Available Buildings:   - Additional Starting Buildings: Astrometeorology Observatory

all.name: Gardening Protocols
all.description: While the organic precursors are gone, their machine creations still maintain a preference for the old aesthetics. The natural world is fertile ground for programmed perfectionism.
all.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies: Technologies to remove on the Homeworld - Technologies to remove Natural Blockers are granted as Permanent Research Options upon Colonization - Mastery of Nature replaced with Cultivated Worldscaping Planetary  - For each Natural Blocker on Colonized :  - Resources from Jobs: -10%  - Pop Assembly: -10%  - Pop Upkeep: +15%
all.negative_tooltip: - Homeworld: Starts with two Natural Blockers

all.name: Caretaker Network
all.description: This Machine Intelligence has a core directive in its source code: Collect and Preserve.
all.tooltip: - Guaranteed Research Options: ['technology:tech_galactic_archivism', Galactic Archivism] - Initial ['concept_specimen', Specimens]: One §0Common of each Collection Category  - Gain Unity each time you find a Specimen or complete an Archaeological Site  - Purchases from the Curator Enclave: $@galactic_curators_curator_enclave_purchase_cost|%0$ - Enables the Decentralized Research Edict, increasing Research Station Output but decreasing [GetResearcher] Job Output

all.name: Stalwart Network
all.description: This Machine Intelligence specializes into defensive military procedures, combining hard defense with hit and run protocols.

all.name: Energy Extractors
all.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  The proper allocation of energy is essential to ensuring ultimate efficiency of the greater machine. All units are designed with this purpose in mind, allowing the periodic overclocking of critical nodes as necessary.
all.tooltip: Enables the following Edicts:  - ['edict:energy_drain',Energy Drain]  - ['edict:sanguine_council_machine',Nexus Charge]  - ['edict:psychic_feast',Convergence of Will] Can construct: . Leaders start with the trait.

all.name: Pattern Finders
all.description: This machine empire claims to be able to solve for the unknown, leveraging esoteric pattern recognition and cyclical anomaly analysis. Celestial alignments are analyzed before every major decision to ensure the best possible predicted result.
all.tooltip: Enables ['edict:galactic_dowsing',Galactic Dowsing] Every 13 years, the changes. Fortune Events will periodically benefit or impair your empire.

all.name: Apostle Network
all.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  Influenced by the Shroud in their early development, these machines are hard-coded with a pact of patronage to a powerful entity.
all.tooltip: - Starts the game in contact with a Shroud Patron. - Additional Starting Technologies:

all.name: Franchising
all.description: This Megacorporation relies heavily on franchising. Subsidiaries share a greater cut of their profits with their corporate overlord, in exchange for a license to market their goods under established brands.
all.tooltip: - Your Subjects cannot have the following Agreement Terms:  Expansion Prohibited  Limited Diplomacy  Independent Sensors - Available Holdings: Franchise Headquarters on Subject colonies - The Commercial Forum Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Trading Posts
all.description: Good business is where you find it. This Megacorporation has a long tradition of spreading its influence through the establishment on trading posts. Their starbases are busy centers of trade.
all.tooltip: - The Commercial Forum Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Media Conglomerate
all.description: Before branching into other fields, this Megacorporation began its rise to fortune as a media conglomerate. Its PR department are still masters of spinning stories and presenting the latest quarterly report in the most advantageous way.
all.tooltip: - The Virtual Entertainment Studios Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Naval Contractors
all.description: This Megacorporation relies on several semi-independent naval contractors to increase its fleet size. Competing for bids, the contractors are always struggling to outperform one another.
all.tooltip: - The Private Military Industries Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Free Traders
all.description: The trading fleets of this Megacorporation are bolstered by semi-independent free traders operating under license.

all.name: Private Prospectors
all.description: Building better worlds is hazardous work, but this Megacorporation relies on private prospectors to chart and establish footholds on promising planets.
all.tooltip: - Unlocks Ship Type: Private Colony Ship - The Private Mining Consortium Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Gospel of the Masses
all.description: This Megacorporation embraces a curious blend of commercial and spiritualistic values, in which the positions of ordained minister and corporate officer have merged into a single role.
all.tooltip: Spiritualist Pops give additional Trade on all Planets and Branch Offices Can build Temple of Prosperity Corporate Building

all.name: Ruthless Competition
all.description: All levels of society in this Megacorporation are constantly vying with each other in ruthless competition. It's a dog-eat-dog world.
all.tooltip: - The Executive Retreat Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Criminal Heritage
all.description: This Megacorporation can trace its origins back to a crime syndicate that eventually grew powerful enough to supplant all forms of local government.
all.tooltip: Can build Branch Offices on the planet of any regular empire they have no war or active truce with Crime on Branch Office Planets increases Branch Office Value Can build special Crime-increasing Corporate Buildings

all.name: Private Military Companies
all.description: This Megacorporation has a large number of powerful private military companies on its payroll. These mercenary contractors augment its ground forces.
all.tooltip: - The Mercenary Liaison Office Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Indentured Assets
all.description: This Megacorporation specializes in large indentured workforces. It has little to do with the barbaric practice of slavery - these workers are merely paying off their debts... indefinitely.
all.tooltip: - The Private Security Company Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Brand Loyalty
all.description: This Megacorporation has fostered a great sense of brand loyalty among its internal consumer base. Its catchy corporate slogans can be recited by nearly everyone.
all.tooltip: - The Corporate Embassy Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Public Relations Specialists
all.description: If you can control what someone thinks, then you can also control their behavior. This Megacorporation has a virtual army of specialists ready to engage in battles of public opinion.
all.tooltip: - The Public Relations Firm Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Corporate Death Cult
all.description: This Megacorporation has embraced ritual sacrifice as a means of ensuring its continuing profits. Willing initiates periodically give their lives in hopes of good fortune for their society.
all.tooltip: - Available Buildings:   - Additional Starting Buildings: Sacrificial Temple   - Available Holdings:   - Access to   - Priests are converted into Death Priests   - The Xeno-Outreach Agency Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Catalytic Recyclers
all.description: This Megacorporation seeks to maximize profits by recycling excess organic matter into advanced resources suitable for spacebound structures.
all.tooltip: - [foundry.GetIcon] [foundry.GetNamePlural] are replaced with Catalytic Technicians  - [foundry.GetIcon] [artisan.GetIcon] Industrial Jobs have their Minerals Upkeep replaced with Food Upkeep.   - The Private Military Industries Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Corporate Hedonism
all.description: Work is where you want to be. The citizens of this Megacorporation happily pledge allegiance - and all their free time - to their employers in exchange for lavish corporate comforts.
all.tooltip: - [civilian.GetIcon] [civilian.GetNamePlural] are converted into Hedonists, which do not produce Amenities   - Allows Decadent Lifestyle Living Standard, under which all Pops have increased Happiness, Consumer Goods Upkeep and Amenities Usage   - Hedonists with Decadent Lifestyle provide Unity and Pop Growth (or Assembly) Speed, but require Amenities   - Additional Starting Buildings:   - The Amusement Megaplex Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Trawling Operations
all.description: This society is well-adapted to an aquatic environment, using the bounty of the sea to fuel its economy.
all.tooltip: - On Ocean Worlds, Agriculture Districts are uncapped.  - On Wet worlds, Agriculture Districts have the Aquaculture Specialization.  - The Fast Food Chain Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.
all.negative_tooltip: - Requires the trait.

all.name: Maritime Robotics
all.description: This mechanical society is engineered for seamless operation in diverse aquatic environments and excels in crafting unparalleled marine infrastructure to drive its economy.
all.tooltip: - On Ocean Worlds, Agriculture Districts are uncapped.  - On Wet worlds, Agriculture Districts have the Aquaculture Specialization.  - The Fast Food Chain Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.
all.negative_tooltip: - Requires the trait.

all.name: Mastercraft Inc.
all.description: This megacorporation has focused its production pipeline solely on goods of the highest quality and profit margins, creating and marketing stunning products with artistry and craft.
all.tooltip: Artisans are replaced with Artificers  Artificers turn Minerals into Consumer Goods and Trade The Virtual Entertainment Studios Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Permanent Employment
all.description: This Megacorporation has ensured that its employees will never be out of a job. Ever. After the employee's time is up, they will be repurposed for simpler tasks so that they can still provide for their families and pay off their debts.
all.tooltip: Can build Posthumous Employment Center  [reassigner.GetNamePlural] turn Consumer Goods and either Food or Minerals into Monthly Organic Pop Growth. All assembled Pops have the Zombie trait.  Grants access to the Reemployment Center Holding.  Some defeated organic Leviathans can be resurrected. The Fast Food Chain Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Shareholder Values
all.description: To live is to exploit. This civilization is built around the principle of living life to the fullest, in the sense of squeezing the maximum profit from every last ounce of matter and membrane available for exploitation.
all.tooltip: Can build Coordinated Fulfillment Center, significantly increasing Alloy and Consumer Goods output at the cost of reduced Pop Growth and gradually turning planets into Tomb Worlds. The Industrial Subsidiary Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Mutagenic Luxury
all.description: This civilization engages in mutagenic bathing, with professional attendants overseeing the use of highly dangerous substances. This 'invigorating' process is marketed as a necessary step in wellbeing and personal development.
all.tooltip: - Can build Mutagenic Spas. - Mutagenic Spa Attendants turn Consumer Goods into Amenities, Pop Growth and Monthly Organic Pop Growth Multiplier but reduce Happiness and Habitability.   Urban District Development (and Industrial Specialization) increase some of these effects. - Can build Corporate Clinic Corporate Building - The Corporate Clinic Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Refurbishment Division
all.description: In this society, nothing goes to waste, even in the grimmest times of war: no enemy technology will go undiscovered, as teams of scrappers accompanying the war fleets scrape wreckages of anything and everything worth salvaging.
all.tooltip: - Researching Debris grants both Research and a portion of other Resource Costs of the destroyed fleet - Ships can be salvaged from some Debris - The Industrial Subsidiary Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Gigacorp
all.description: The ultimate goal of this empire is to ascend to ever greater levels of fulfillment.
all.tooltip: - Colonies have +1 Ascension Tier on game start.  - The Public Relations Firm Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Privatized Exploration
all.description: For years, this civilization was told that the hyperdrive was almost finished. Patiently they waited, yet all the while, the subsidiary in charge of the project was quietly diverting the funds into their own, private accounts. When the fraud was finally revealed, the Corporation hastened to provide experimental, exploratory vessels.
all.tooltip: Start with 2 Exploration Vessels and an Engineering Vessel equipped with Subspace Drives, making them incapable of Hyperlane travel but granting limited Jump Drive abilities. Gain an increased chance to discover FTL Travel Technologies Start with the Starhold technology and a Starhold already built in your home system. The Private Mining Consortium Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.
all.negative_tooltip: - Start at a technological and infrastructural disadvantage, and with 1K fewer Pops than normal

all.name: Hyperspace Trade
all.description: Time is money, and this Megacorporation values speed. Heavy investment in R&D has paid off handsomely, granting the Corporation proprietary access to cutting-edge hyperspace manipulation techniques.
all.tooltip: Hyperlane Breach Points is Guaranteed Research Option. Has Low Intel on all systems within 3 Hyperlanes of your starting system. The Amusement Megaplex Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Dimensional Enterprise
all.description: This society believes that a divine existence lies beyond the folds in space and time. Systems where instabilities are highest hold a sacred meaning to them as sites of both pilgrimage and research.
all.tooltip: - Available Starbase Buildings: ['starbase_building:dimensional_shrine', Dimensional Shrine]   - The Xeno-Outreach Agency Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Letters of Marque
all.description: To combat space piracy and safeguard its borders, this megacorporation utilizes notorious pirates as military advisors and commanders for their fleets.
all.tooltip: Commanders start with the Material Liberator trait Has the 'Pirate Raid' casus belli on all other empires. The Mercenary Liaison Office Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Precision Cogs
all.description: This megacorporation operates on a highly optimized and robust system of delegation. Such an approach means that a given task is always performed by the most qualified worker.
all.tooltip: - The Executive Retreat Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Pharma State
all.description: A strong nation is a healthy nation. This megacorporation maintains a robust economy through experimental drugs, highly privatized clinics, and aggressive marketing campaigns.
all.tooltip: - Capital Buildings provide +100 [healthcare.GetIcon] [healthcare.GetName] Jobs - Amenities from [healthcare.GetIcon] [healthcare.GetNamePlural]: +2 - Trade from [healthcare.GetIcon] [healthcare.GetNamePlural]: +4 - Can build Corporate Clinic Corporate Building - The Corporate Clinic Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Knowledge Mentorship
all.description: The knowledge, principles, and experiences of exceptional people are digitized and accumulated in the Vaults of Knowledge. Citizens can access this source of wisdom and experience to learn from the ghosts of the past. For a price, of course.
all.tooltip: Can build unique Vaults of Knowledge Vaults of Knowledge produce Unity and Trade based on Destiny Traits acquired. The Commercial Forum Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Worker Cooperative
all.description: Members of this society enjoy an equal share in the labors, profits and aspirations of the cooperative's ventures.
all.tooltip: - Allows Employee Ownership Living Standard, under which all Pops have high Consumer Goods Upkeep regardless of Strata   - Disables the use of most other Living Standards   - Available Policies:   - Replaces Executive and Manager Jobs with ['concept_steward', Steward] Jobs   - The Corporate Embassy Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Shadow Corporation
all.description: A deep understanding of the architecture of the universe allowed this society to exploit the mysterious properties of dark matter long before the discovery of the hyperdrive.
all.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies:  - ['technology:tech_mine_dark_matter', Dark Matter Drawing]   - Access to   - Has access to the Dark Matter Breakthrough Council Agenda.   - The Private Research Enterprises Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Augmentation Bazaars
all.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  Commodified cybernetics have spawned labyrinthine markets, crowded with cut-rate augmentation dealers, shady mod clinics, and harshly-lit advertisements. Indulge in a synergy of flesh and circuitry, no matter your level of income.
all.tooltip: - Species Traits: One random ['concept_basic_cyborg_trait', Basic Cybernetic Trait] - Available Buildings:  - Available Holdings:  - Executives are replaced with Augmentation Merchants

all.name: Corporate Protectorate
all.description: This society of competing industries has learned that the best protection for their investments is a strong defensive posturing. Now united, they are prepared to bring this philosophy to the stars, aiming to keep their borders solid and tensions low.
all.tooltip: Unlocks Fanatic Guardians as defense armies. Allows building a Reloading Bay in starbases. Enables Inner Focus Edict, converting Influence into Unity.

all.name: Astrogenesis Technologies
all.description: This Megacorporation is unwavering in its commitment to deliberately forming emerging species. They strategically designate substantial regions of their worlds to ensure the progression of pre-sapient life forms, all within the framework of responsible business ventures.
all.tooltip: - Available Colony Ships: Genesis Ark - Planets Colonized with Genesis Arks:  - Pre-Sapient Pops: +300   - Planetary Features: Genesis Preserve  - Gains Unity from uplifting Pre-Sapient Species - The Xeno-Outreach Agency Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.
all.negative_tooltip: - Cannot build Colony Ships - Cannot build Alien Zoos

all.name: Luxury Lubrication Pools
all.description: Thank the maker! The luxurious, addictively soft texture of these lubricants are essential to reduce the signs of wear and tear on an aging chassis. A specially crafted infusion of premium, heat-activated oils keeps the population of this machine empire looking and feeling "factory new." Works beautifully for all models and purpose types.
all.tooltip: - Can build Hyper Lubrication Basins. - Lubrication Terminals turn Alloys into Pop Assembly but increase Amenities Usage. - Can build Corporate Clinic Corporate Building - The Corporate Clinic Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Weather Exploitation
all.description: What are environmental effects if not another free resource to exploit? This megacorp specializes in acquiring as much knowledge from astrometeorological phenomena as they can and sell it to the highest bidder.
all.tooltip: - Available Buildings:   - Additional Starting Buildings: Astrometeorology Observatory   - The Private Research Enterprises Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Storm Influencers
all.description: What started as a simple broadcast of sacred rituals, has since blossomed into a massive media conglomerate. Seers and priests were replaced by charismatic entertainers, all competing to gain a modicum of attention as they appeal to the cosmic storms themselves.
all.tooltip: - Available Buildings:  - Replaces [entertainer.GetIcon] [entertainer.GetName] Jobs with Storm Dancer Jobs - Species Traits:  - The Amusement Megaplex Corporate Building generates additional Branch Office Value and adds +50 Merchant jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Geo-Engineering Inc.
all.description: The employees of this Megacorp are used to living inside a golden cage. Accordingly, the corporation will build one wherever they go.
all.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies: Technologies to remove on the Homeworld - Technologies to remove Natural Blockers are granted as Permanent Research Options upon Colonization - Mastery of Nature replaced with Cultivated Worldscaping Planetary  - For each Natural Blocker on Colonized :  - Resources from Jobs: -10%  - Pop Growth Speed: -10%  - Pop Upkeep: +15% - The Executive Retreat Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.
all.negative_tooltip: - Homeworld: Starts with two Natural Blockers

all.name: Antiquarian Expertise
all.description: There is money to be made in antiques and collectibles, which this society knows better than anyone else. Experts in material speculation, they now look skyward for investment opportunities.
all.tooltip: - Guaranteed Research Options: ['technology:tech_galactic_archivism', Galactic Archivism] - Initial ['concept_specimen', Specimens]: One §0Common of each Collection Category  - Gain Unity each time you find a Specimen or complete an Archaeological Site  - Purchases from the Curator Enclave: $@galactic_curators_curator_enclave_purchase_cost|%0$ - Enables the Decentralized Research Edict, increasing Research Station Output but decreasing [GetResearcher] Job Output - Replaces Entertainer Jobs with Museum Curator Jobs - The Public Relations Firm Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Space Ranchers
all.description: Originally an elite guild of animal ranchers, this Megacorporation has developed the technology to raise and care for the voidborne creatures in its home system.
all.tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies:  - ['technology:tech_gravity_wells', Gravity Snares]  - ['technology:tech_alien_cloning', Artificial Breeding]  - Available Starbase Buildings: ['concept_beastport', Beastports]  - Home System: Start with a   - Starting Military Ships are replaced with Space Amoebas  - Starting :  - §0Common Space Amoeba  - The Fast Food Chain Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Sequenced Securities
all.description: The genetic sequence of every customer and employee is recorded in a database that anyone can access for a modest fee. Enforcement agencies rely on this service intensively to identify nefarious actors from even the smallest residues.
all.tooltip: - The Private Security Company Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Decentralized R&D
all.description: Regular inter-department innovation competitions spur this corporation's R&D initiatives.
all.tooltip: - Factions produce Research instead of Unity   - Factions will form in your empire shortly after the game starts   - The Private Research Enterprises Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Corporate Vampires
all.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  This Megacorporation drains valuable metabolism from idle population via parasitic psychic connections. Once properly collected, these energies can be redistributed to senior management.
all.tooltip: Enables the following Edicts:  - ['edict:energy_drain',Energy Drain]  - ['edict:sanguine_council',Sanguine Council]  - ['edict:psychic_feast',Convergence of Will] Can construct: . Leaders start with the trait. The Executive Retreat Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Fortune Enterprise
all.description: This corporation claims to have discovered a ritualistic mechanism to predict the future, leveraging esoteric pattern recognition and cyclical anomaly analysis. To maximize outcomes, future gains and losses are weighed alongside the KPIs of ideal celestial alignments.
all.tooltip: Replaces:  - Priests with Fortune Tellers  - High Priests with Fortune Brokers Enables ['edict:galactic_dowsing',Galactic Dowsing] Every 13 years, the changes. Fortune Events will periodically benefit or impair your empire.

all.name: Judicial R&D
all.description: This Megacorporation has actioned an exciting initiative to reduce judicial inefficiencies while maximizing scientific innovation. Problematic citizens are reassigned to experimental research projects, undergoing rigorous testing to achieve technological breakthroughs. Fatality metrics are maintained within projected expectations.
all.tooltip: Starts with situation, which grants technology insight upon completion. Can construct and starts with: . Can construct Corporate Building. All non-Machine slaves get access to the Slave Job. Access to : Abominations

all.name: Influential Cartel
all.description: This Megacorporation's most powerful offices conduct extraplanetary operations on a strictly need-to-know basis. If you need to ask, you don't need to know.
all.tooltip: Clandestine will emerge after contacting other empires. Starts with the ability to conduct . [bureaucrat.GetIcon] [bureaucrat.GetNamePlural] will produce Unity per active and successful Proxy War. Starts in with two neighboring empires. Infiltration Level gained on empires after First Contact: +$@secret_society_infiltration_gain|0$ The Corporate Embassy Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Chosen Executives
all.description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for .  Since their founding, this corporation has owed its success to a mysterious Shroud entity, and has been operating under a pact of patronage ever since.
all.tooltip: - Starts the game in contact with a Shroud Patron. - Additional Starting Technologies:  - The Psionic Offices Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

all.name: Corporate Thinktank
all.description: This society universally adopted an experimental product in the form of specialized habitation vats. As a result, they are heavily reliant on assistive equipment and incapable of engaging directly in physical work.
all.tooltip: Adds the trait. Rural Districts have their Worker Jobs fully Automated. ['concept_colonist', Colonist] Jobs are Specialists. Start with insight on ['technology:tech_assembly_pattern', Assembly Patterns] Technology.  Urban Districts have additional Production Overseers jobs. The Virtual Entertainment Studios Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital. all.negative_tooltip: - Start with 2K fewer Pops than normal
